  color: var(--txt-mute, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55));
}

/* Each option row matches the Primary action button height so the open
   list reads as a stack of capsules ŌĆö selecting a value visually swaps
   the trigger for one of the rows. */
html.website-scope .website-native-select__option {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 2px;
  min-height: var(--website-control-height);
  padding: 0 18px;
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.3;
  color: var(--txt-bright, #fff);
  /* Full-pill capsule ŌĆö matches the /website button shape style. */
  border-radius: 999px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.15s ease;
}

html.website-scope .website-native-select__option:hover,
html.website-scope .website-native-select__option--active {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}

html.website-scope .website-native-select__option--selected {
  background: rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.22);
  color: #fff;
}

html.website-scope .website-native-select__option--selected:hover,
html.website-scope .website-native-select__option--selected.website-native-select__option--active {
  background: rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.32);
}

html.website-scope .website-native-select__option-label {
  font-weight: 600;
}

html.website-scope .website-native-select__option-hint {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: var(--txt-mute, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55));
}

/* Custom-rendered date/time pickers for /website. The hidden native input
   keeps browser form semantics; the visible trigger uses the same Primary
   action chrome and opens a .website-calendar-style surface. */
html.website-scope .website-native-datetime {
  position: relative;
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
}

html.website-scope .website-native-datetime__field {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0 auto auto 0;
  width: 1px;
  height: 1px;
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}

html.website-scope .website-native-datetime__trigger {
  width: 100%;
  justify-content: space-between;
  text-align: left;
}

html.website-scope .website-native-datetime__value,
html.website-scope .website-native-datetime__placeholder {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

html.website-scope .website-native-datetime__placeholder {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
}

html.website-scope .website-native-datetime__icon {
  width: 14px;
  height: 14px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  opacity: 0.8;
  background: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 16 16' fill='none' stroke='%23ffffff' stroke-width='1.4'%3E%3Crect x='2.5' y='3' width='11' height='11' rx='1.5'/%3E%3Cpath d='M2.5 6h11M5 2v2M11 2v2'/%3E%3C/svg%3E") no-repeat center / contain;
}

html.website-scope .website-native-datetime[data-type="time"] .website-native-datetime__icon {
  background: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 16 16' fill='none' stroke='%23ffffff' stroke-width='1.4'%3E%3Ccircle cx='8' cy='8' r='5.5'/%3E%3Cpath d='M8 4.5V8l2.5 1.5'/%3E%3C/svg%3E") no-repeat center / contain;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Text-like inputs and textareas ŌĆö share the Primary action
   liquid-glass capsule so a "name" field, a "date" field, and a
   button line up at the same 44px height with the same clear
   white-glass tint and outer shadow. CSS module classes (e.g.
   `.authInput` on login / profile) still win on specificity and
   keep their bespoke look.

   `type="email"` is intentionally omitted: the customer surface
   collapses email entry into the standard text input so there's
   one capsule style and one backend path. New /website forms
   should use <input type="text"> for email-shaped values. */
html.website-scope input[type="text"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope input[type="password"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope input[type="tel"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope input[type="number"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope input[type="search"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope input[type="url"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope input[type="date"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope input[type="time"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope textarea:not(.app-btn) {
  appearance: none;
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: var(--website-control-height);
  padding: 0 18px;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
  line-height: 1;
  color: #ffffff;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 100%);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(180%);
  backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(180%);
  border: none;
  /* Text box / textarea share the Primary action capsule shape ŌĆö the
     full-pill 999px corner used by the /website buttons, not the
     rectangular --website-control-radius (14px). */
  border-radius: 999px;
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18),
    0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
  transition: background 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
}
/* Textarea grows by line as the user types ŌĆö no manual resize handle,
   no fixed minimum row count. Single line by default; `field-sizing:
   content` lets the box auto-grow when the text wraps to a new line. */
html.website-scope textarea:not(.app-btn) {
  resize: none;
  field-sizing: content;
  padding: 12px 18px;
  line-height: 1.45;
}
html.website-scope input[type="text"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope input[type="password"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope input[type="tel"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope input[type="number"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope input[type="search"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope input[type="url"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope input[type="date"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope input[type="time"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope textarea:not(.app-btn):focus-visible {
  outline: none;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.20) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.09) 100%);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18),
    0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28),
    0 0 0 3px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.32);
}
html.website-scope input::placeholder,
html.website-scope textarea::placeholder {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);
}

/* Native date/time pickers ŌĆö let the browser's calendar/time popup
   render in dark mode, recolour the picker indicator so it reads on
   the clear capsule, and on hover swap it to the brand red so it
   matches the calendar surface that opens below. */
html.website-scope input[type="date"],
html.website-scope input[type="time"] {
  color-scheme: dark;
}
html.website-scope input[type="date"]::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator,
html.website-scope input[type="time"]::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator {
  filter: invert(1) opacity(0.85);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: filter 0.15s ease;
}
html.website-scope input[type="date"]::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator:hover,
html.website-scope input[type="time"]::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator:hover {
  filter: invert(0.5) sepia(1) hue-rotate(330deg) saturate(8);
}

/* Radios only ŌĆö the customer surface intentionally has no checkboxes;
   binary on/off choices are presented as a two-option radio group so
   the selected state is unambiguous on the dark-glass background. */
html.website-scope input[type="radio"]:not(.app-btn) {
  appearance: none;
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  border: var(--checkbox-ring);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  cursor: pointer;
  position: relative;
  transition: background 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
html.website-scope input[type="radio"]:not(.app-btn):checked {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 90, 90, 0.98) 0%, var(--accentText) 100%);
  border: var(--checkbox-ring);
}
html.website-scope input[type="radio"]:not(.app-btn):checked::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 4px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #fff;
}
html.website-scope input[type="radio"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible {
  outline: none;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.35);
}

/* File input ŌĆö the picker button reuses the Primary action capsule so
   "Choose file" lines up with the sibling buttons / inputs. */
html.website-scope input[type="file"]:not(.app-btn) {
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--txt-soft);
  min-height: var(--website-control-height);
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
}
html.website-scope input[type="file"]::file-selector-button {
  appearance: none;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  height: var(--website-control-height);
  padding: 0 18px;
  margin-right: 12px;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
  line-height: 1;
  color: #ffffff;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 100%);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(180%);
  backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(180%);
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--website-control-radius);
  cursor: pointer;
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18),
    0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
  transition: background 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, transform 0.15s ease;
}
html.website-scope input[type="file"]::file-selector-button:hover {
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10) 100%);
}
html.website-scope input[type="file"]::file-selector-button:active {
  transform: translateY(1px);
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar {
  position: absolute;
  top: calc(100% + 6px);
  left: 0;
  z-index: 50;
  max-width: min(100vw - 24px, 100%);
  border-radius: 14px;
  /* Card background style (.website-dev-flat-card) ŌĆö the single /website
     card surface. The backdrop-filter blur below keeps the floating panel
     readable despite the translucent fill. */
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
  backdrop-filter: blur(28px) saturate(190%);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(28px) saturate(190%);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08),
    0 24px 56px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55);
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar {
  width: 304px;
  max-width: calc(100vw - 24px);
  padding: 14px;
  border-radius: 16px;
  /* Theme-aware default text colour for the whole calendar surface ŌĆö
     --txt-bright resolves to white in dark mode and to near-black in
     light mode, so the title and any uncoloured text always reads
     against the calendar background. */
  color: var(--txt-bright, #fff);
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__header,
html.website-scope .website-calendar__footer {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 8px;
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__header {
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__title {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__nav,
html.website-scope .website-calendar__footer button:not(.app-btn) {
  appearance: none;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: #fff;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-align: center;
  text-transform: none;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  transition: background 0.15s ease;
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__nav {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  min-height: 32px;
  padding: 0;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 1;
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__nav:hover,
html.website-scope .website-calendar__footer button:not(.app-btn):hover {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__weekdays,
html.website-scope .website-calendar__grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(7, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 2px;
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__weekdays {
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__weekdays span {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 10px;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--txt-mute, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55));
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__day {
  appearance: none;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 100%;
  height: 34px;
  min-height: 34px;
  padding: 0;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1;
  color: var(--txt-bright, #fff);
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  text-align: center;
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-transform: none;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__day:hover {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__day:disabled {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
  cursor: not-allowed;
  background: transparent;
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__day--muted {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28);
}

/* Day cells take the full-pill /website button shape. Scoped with the
   `.website-calendar__grid` ancestor (0,3,2) so it beats the calendar
   opt-out block (`button.website-calendar__day`, 0,2,2 ŌĆö radius 8px)
   without touching the shared `.calendar-api__day` reset. */
html.website-scope .website-calendar__grid button.website-calendar__day {
  border-radius: 999px;
}

/* Current day ŌĆö marked by the brand-red focus-ring outline
   (var(--focus-ring)), NOT a filled capsule. The cell otherwise stays a
   plain day: transparent fill, theme-aware day-number colour, same pill
   shape as every other day. */
/* NOTE: specificity must beat the LIGHT-mode generic button rule
   `html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] button:not(.app-btn)`,
   which is (0,3,2) ŌĆö `.website-scope` + `[data-website-theme]` + `:not()`
   are all class-level ŌĆö and would otherwise repaint the cell with a white
   gradient + shadow in light mode. The `.website-calendar__grid` ancestor
   + both day classes lift this selector to (0,4,2) so the ring wins in
   BOTH themes. */
html.website-scope .website-calendar__grid button.website-calendar__day.website-calendar__day--today {
  font-weight: 600;
  background: transparent;
  /* INSET ring ŌĆö drawn inside the cell so today does not grow larger than
     a plain day. An outer box-shadow (e.g. var(--focus-ring)) would extend
     past the cell edge into the 2px grid gap. */
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.7);
}
html.website-scope .website-calendar__grid button.website-calendar__day.website-calendar__day--today:hover {
  /* Hover keeps the cell transparent and just intensifies the inset red
     ring ŌĆö theme-agnostic, so no per-theme background override is needed. */
  background: transparent;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px rgb(var(--accentMainRgb));
}

/* Selected day keeps the solid red fill but NOT a heavier weight ŌĆö every
   plain day number 1ŌĆō31 stays the same size and weight (500, set by the
   calendar opt-out block above). Only today opts out, into the .app-btn
   capsule. */
html.website-scope .website-calendar__grid button.website-calendar__day.website-calendar__day--selected,
html.website-scope .website-calendar__grid button.website-calendar__day.website-calendar__day--selected:hover {
  color: #fff;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 90, 90, 0.98) 0%, var(--accentText) 100%);
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__footer {
  margin-top: 10px;
}

html.website-scope .website-calendar__footer button:not(.app-btn) {
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 34px;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 11px;
  line-height: 1;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* The footer's "Today" (current-date) button opts into the Secondary
   action style by carrying `app-btn`. Keep it sized to the footer row ŌĆö
   flex:1 so it shares width with "Clear", and a 34px floor so it lines
   up with the sibling instead of the 44px control-system default. */
html.website-scope .website-calendar__footer button.app-btn {
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 34px;
  font-size: 11px;
}

html.website-scope .website-time-picker {
  width: 304px;
}

html.website-scope .website-time-picker__grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 6px;
  max-height: 220px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding-right: 2px;
}

html.website-scope button.website-time-picker__option {
  appearance: none;
  min-height: 34px;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1;
  color: var(--txt-bright, #fff);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-align: center;
  text-transform: none;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
}

html.website-scope button.website-time-picker__option:hover {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
}

html.website-scope button.website-time-picker__option--selected,
html.website-scope button.website-time-picker__option--selected:hover {
  color: #fff;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 90, 90, 0.98) 0%, var(--accentText) 100%);
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Banner / alert ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ
   Reuses the Secondary action liquid-glass pill (red tint, same
   blur and inner highlights) so an inline notice on /website reads
   as a sibling of the secondary buttons. Height matches the
   control system so a banner sitting next to a button or input
   lines up on the same row. */
html.website-scope .website-banner {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  min-height: var(--website-control-height);
  padding: 0 18px;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
  line-height: 1;
  text-align: center;
  color: #ffffff;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.22) 0%, rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.10) 100%);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(180%);
  backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(180%);
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--website-control-radius);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18),
    0 8px 22px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.18);
  transition:
    background 0.2s ease,
    box-shadow 0.2s ease,
    transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1);
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ /website/dev showcase defaults ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ
   The dev page uses these same global primitives rather than carrying
   local presentation styles. They are intentionally scoped to the
   website-dev-* classes so real customer pages only inherit the shared
   control, card, calendar, banner, scrollbar and typography defaults. */
html.website-scope .website-dev-shell {
  min-height: 100vh;
  padding: 32px clamp(16px, 4vw, 48px) 96px;
  background: transparent;
  color: #fff;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 24px;
  align-items: start;
}

/* Page title and any section flagged --wide always take the full row. */
html.website-scope .website-dev-page-title,
html.website-scope .website-dev-section--wide {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
}

/* Below ~960px the two-column grid is too cramped ŌĆö collapse to a single
   column so every showcase section gets the full content width back. */
@media (max-width: 960px) {
  html.website-scope .website-dev-shell {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
  }
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-page-title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 32px;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-section {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
  padding: 22px clamp(16px, 3vw, 28px);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
  border-radius: 18px;
  align-self: stretch;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-section__header,
html.website-scope .website-dev-section__body,
html.website-scope .website-dev-swatch__meta,
html.website-scope .website-dev-text-scale,
html.website-scope .website-dev-ref-list,
html.website-scope .website-dev-locked {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-section__header {
  gap: 4px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-section__title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.2px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-section__body {
  gap: 18px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(140px, 220px) 1fr;
  gap: 20px;
  align-items: start;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-row__label,
html.website-scope .website-dev-form-label {
  font-size: 11px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-row__label {
  font-size: 12px;
  padding-top: 10px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-row__body {
  min-width: 0;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-cluster,
html.website-scope .website-dev-swatch-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-cluster {
  gap: 10px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-swatch-row {
  gap: 14px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-swatch {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  min-width: 200px;
  padding: 10px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
  border-radius: 12px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-swatch__chip {
  width: 36px;
  height: 36px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-swatch__chip--big {
  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
  border-radius: 12px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-swatch__meta {
  gap: 2px;
  min-width: 0;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-swatch__label {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #fff;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-swatch__note,
html.website-scope .website-dev-code,
html.website-scope .website-dev-code-mono {
  font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-swatch__note {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-wash-preview {
  position: relative;
  height: 160px;
  padding: 14px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-end;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at top right, rgba(185, 28, 28, 0.45), transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at bottom left, rgba(185, 28, 28, 0.45), transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at top left, rgba(22, 22, 26, 0.70), transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at bottom right, rgba(22, 22, 26, 0.70), transparent 60%),
    #07070b;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-wash-caption {
  max-width: 520px;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
  line-height: 1.5;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-text-scale {
  gap: 6px;
  font-size: 14px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-text-bright { color: #fff; }
html.website-scope .website-dev-text-soft { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.78); }
html.website-scope .website-dev-text-mute { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55); }
html.website-scope .website-dev-text-faint { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.32); }

html.website-scope .website-dev-heading-one {
  margin: 0;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-heading-two {
  margin: 8px 0 0;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-meta {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-copy {
  margin: 0;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-token-table-wrap {
  overflow-x: auto;
  margin: 0 -8px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-token-table {
  width: 100%;
  min-width: 720px;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-token-th {
  padding: 10px 12px;
  text-align: left;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-token-cell {
  padding: 10px 12px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-token-cell--chip {
  width: 36px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-token-cell--name {
  white-space: nowrap;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-token-cell--value {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-token-cell--purpose {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65);
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-token-chip {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-token-chip--missing {
  background:
    repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 3px, transparent 3px, transparent 6px);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-code {
  padding: 2px 6px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 12px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-code-mono {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75);
  font-size: 12px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-choice {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
  cursor: pointer;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-choice-list {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 8px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-form-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr));
  gap: var(--website-field-gap);
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-form-field {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: var(--website-field-gap);
  min-width: 0;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-control-width {
  max-width: 320px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-wide-control {
  max-width: 560px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-calendar-preview {
  position: relative;
  width: 320px;
  height: 360px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-calendar-static {
  position: static;
}

/* Static showcase of the open select menu ŌĆö drops the absolute positioning
   so the dropdown list renders inline, the same way the calendar surface
   is shown above it. */
html.website-scope .website-dev-select-static {
  position: static;
  max-height: none;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-flat-card {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
  max-width: 560px;
  padding: 22px clamp(16px, 3vw, 28px);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
  border-radius: 18px;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-card-eyebrow {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: 1.5px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #b91c1c;
  font-weight: 700;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-card-title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-card-lead {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
  line-height: 1.55;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-scroll-host {
  max-width: 560px;
  height: 180px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding: 14px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 10px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.78);
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-banner-strong {
  color: #fff;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-banner-copy {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-scroll-row {
  margin: 0;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-ref-list {
  margin: 0;
  padding-left: 20px;
  gap: 12px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-ref-note {
  margin-top: 4px;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);
  line-height: 1.5;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-locked {
  min-height: 60vh;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 24px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
  background: #07070b;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-locked__title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 20px;
  color: #fff;
}

html.website-scope .website-dev-locked__body {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 13px;
}

@media (max-width: 720px) {
  html.website-scope .website-dev-row {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  html.website-scope .website-dev-row__label {
    padding-top: 0;
  }
}

/* ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ /website light theme ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ
   Everything above renders the customer surface DARK by default ŌĆö that
   is the baseline `html.website-scope` look. When the profile page's
   theme cycle button writes data-website-theme="light" onto <html>, the
   overrides below repaint the same control / surface / calendar / banner
   primitives for a light background.

   data-website-theme="dark" (or the attribute being absent) keeps the
   dark default, so only the light branch needs declaring here. The
   "System" choice is resolved to a concrete "light" / "dark" value in JS
   before the attribute is written, so the CSS only ever sees one of the
   two real themes.

   These selectors carry the extra [data-website-theme="light"] attribute,
   so they out-specify the dark rules above; `!important` is only repeated
   where the dark baseline itself used `!important` (the token block,
   the body/html background and the scrollbar gutter ŌĆö all of which must
   still beat the staff themeProvider's inline styles). */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] {
  color-scheme: light !important;

  /* Light surface tokens. Brand red is untouched ŌĆö it stays fixed in
     both themes (the --accentMain / --primary block above still wins). */
  --surface: #ffffff !important;
  --surfaceMain: #ffffff !important;
  --surfaceText: #14141a !important;

  /* Light text scale ŌĆö dark ink on the pale surface (mirrors the dark
     --txt-* ramp, flipped). */
  --txt-bright: #14141a !important;
  --txt-soft: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.74) !important;
  --txt-mute: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.54) !important;
  --txt-faint: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.34) !important;

  /* Rings darken so they read on the light surface. */
  --ghostbutton-ring: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16) !important;
  --input-ring: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14) !important;
  --checkbox-ring: 2px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28) !important;
  --focus-ring: 0 0 0 3px rgba(185, 28, 28, 0.30) !important;

  /* Light scrollbar gutter, brand-red thumb retained. */
  --scrollbar-thumb: #b91c1c !important;
  --scrollbar-thumb-hover: #d22424 !important;

  /* Surface elevation re-painted as faint dark washes ŌĆö the customer
     cards stay just as visible on the pale surface as the white washes
     are on the dark one. */
  --website-elev-1: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) !important;
  --website-elev-2: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06) !important;
  --website-elev-3: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.085) !important;
  --website-elev-4: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.11) !important;
}

/* Light customer surface ŌĆö mirrors the dark body wash, flipped: two
   red glows top-right + bottom-left, two soft cool-grey glows in the
   opposite corners, over a near-white base. The red uses a brighter
   tone (232, 60, 60) at a slightly higher alpha than the dark wash so
   it still reads as a warm corner glow against the pale surface. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] body {
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at top right, rgba(237, 33, 33, 0.22), transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at bottom left, rgba(237, 33, 33, 0.22), transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at top left, rgba(214, 214, 222, 0.55), transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at bottom right, rgba(214, 214, 222, 0.55), transparent 60%),
    #fdfdfe !important;
  background-attachment: fixed !important;
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] {
  background: #fdfdfe !important;
}

/* Light scrollbar gutter. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"],
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] body {
  scrollbar-color: var(--scrollbar-thumb) #e6e6ea;
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"]::-webkit-scrollbar,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] body::-webkit-scrollbar,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"]::-webkit-scrollbar-track,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] body::-webkit-scrollbar-track,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"]::-webkit-scrollbar-corner,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] body::-webkit-scrollbar-corner {
  background: #e6e6ea;
}

/* Primary action ŌĆö light glass: white-glass capsule with dark ink and a
   soft neutral shadow (the dark theme's translucent white-glass would
   vanish against the light surface). */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] button:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] [role="button"]:not(.app-btn) {
  color: #14141a;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.32) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) 100%);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10),
    0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] button:not(.app-btn):hover,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] [role="button"]:not(.app-btn):hover {
  color: #14141a;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.50) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.30) 100%);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] button:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] [role="button"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible {
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10),
    0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12),
    0 0 0 3px rgba(185, 28, 28, 0.30);
}

/* Secondary action ŌĆö light: a brand-red capsule. The fill is kept lighter
   / a touch more transparent than a flat solid red, but still opaque
   enough that the white label keeps its contrast on the white surface
   (the dark theme's faint red wash would be near-invisible pink here).
   Hover lifts back toward the fuller red. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] button.app-btn,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] [role="button"].app-btn,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] a.app-btn {
  color: #ffffff;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.88) 0%, rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.74) 100%);
  /* Same shadow as the light Primary action button ŌĆö neutral drop +
     inset rim, not the red-tinted shadow it carried before. */
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10),
    0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] button.app-btn:hover,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] [role="button"].app-btn:hover,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] a.app-btn:hover {
  color: #ffffff;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.96) 0%, rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.84) 100%);
}
/* Focus shadow also matches the light Primary action button. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] button.app-btn:focus-visible,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] [role="button"].app-btn:focus-visible,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] a.app-btn:focus-visible {
  outline: none;
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10),
    0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12),
    0 0 0 3px rgba(185, 28, 28, 0.30);
}

/* Light select trigger ŌĆö light glass + dark ink + dark caret. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] select:not(.app-btn) {
  color: #14141a;
  background-image:
    url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 12 8' fill='none' stroke='%2314141a' stroke-width='1.5'%3E%3Cpath d='M1 1.5l5 5 5-5'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.32) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) 100%);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10),
    0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] select:not(.app-btn):hover {
  background-image:
    url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 12 8' fill='none' stroke='%2314141a' stroke-width='1.5'%3E%3Cpath d='M1 1.5l5 5 5-5'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.50) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.30) 100%);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] select:not(.app-btn) option {
  color: #14141a;
  background: #ffffff;
}
/* Light selected / hovered option ŌĆö the dark rule paints white text on a
   faint red tint (rgba(red, 0.28) over white), which is unreadable on the
   white light menu. Light mode uses the solid brand red with white ink. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] select:not(.app-btn) option:checked,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] select:not(.app-btn) option:hover {
  background: rgb(var(--accentMainRgb));
  color: #ffffff;
}

/* Custom select trigger / caret / menu ŌĆö light surfaces. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-native-select__placeholder,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-native-datetime__placeholder {
  color: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.55);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-native-select__caret {
  background: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 12 8' fill='none' stroke='%2314141a' stroke-width='1.5'%3E%3Cpath d='M1 1.5l5 5 5-5'/%3E%3C/svg%3E") no-repeat center / contain;
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-native-datetime__icon {
  background: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 16 16' fill='none' stroke='%2314141a' stroke-width='1.4'%3E%3Crect x='2.5' y='3' width='11' height='11' rx='1.5'/%3E%3Cpath d='M2.5 6h11M5 2v2M11 2v2'/%3E%3C/svg%3E") no-repeat center / contain;
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-native-datetime[data-type="time"] .website-native-datetime__icon {
  background: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 16 16' fill='none' stroke='%2314141a' stroke-width='1.4'%3E%3Ccircle cx='8' cy='8' r='5.5'/%3E%3Cpath d='M8 4.5V8l2.5 1.5'/%3E%3C/svg%3E") no-repeat center / contain;
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-native-select__menu {
  /* Card background style ŌĆö light (.website-dev-flat-card light variant). */
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.035);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9),
    0 24px 56px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-native-select__option:hover,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-native-select__option--active {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
}
/* Light selected option row ŌĆö the dark rule (faint red tint + white ink)
   is unreadable on the white light menu. Light mode paints the row solid
   brand red with white ink so it reads as a clear, selected capsule. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-native-select__option--selected,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-native-select__option--selected:hover,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-native-select__option--selected.website-native-select__option--active {
  background: rgb(var(--accentMainRgb));
  color: #ffffff;
}
/* The secondary hint line follows the row ink onto the red fill. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-native-select__option--selected .website-native-select__option-hint {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.78);
}

/* Light text-like inputs / textareas ŌĆö light glass + dark ink. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="text"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="password"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="tel"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="number"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="search"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="url"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="date"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="time"]:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] textarea:not(.app-btn) {
  color: #14141a;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.32) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) 100%);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10),
    0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="text"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="password"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="tel"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="number"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="search"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="url"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="date"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="time"]:not(.app-btn):focus-visible,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] textarea:not(.app-btn):focus-visible {
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.50) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.30) 100%);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10),
    0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12),
    0 0 0 3px rgba(185, 28, 28, 0.30);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input::placeholder,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] textarea::placeholder {
  color: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.5);
}

/* Native date/time picker indicator ŌĆö dark glyph on the light capsule. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="date"],
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="time"] {
  color-scheme: light;
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="date"]::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="time"]::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator {
  filter: opacity(0.7);
}

/* File picker button ŌĆö light glass. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="file"]::file-selector-button {
  color: #14141a;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.32) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) 100%);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10),
    0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="file"]::file-selector-button:hover {
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.50) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.30) 100%);
}

/* Light calendar / time-picker surfaces. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-calendar,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-time-picker {
  /* Card background style ŌĆö light (.website-dev-flat-card light variant). */
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.035);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9),
    0 24px 56px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-calendar__nav,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-calendar__footer button:not(.app-btn),
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] button.website-time-picker__option {
  color: #14141a;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-calendar__nav:hover,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-calendar__footer button:not(.app-btn):hover,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] button.website-time-picker__option:hover {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-calendar__day:hover {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
}
/* Today's red focus-ring hover is theme-agnostic (see the --today:hover
   rule near the day-cell block) ŌĆö no light-mode override needed. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-calendar__day:disabled {
  color: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.25);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-calendar__day--muted {
  color: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.32);
}
/* Selected day / time still render white-on-red ŌĆö kept from the dark rules. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] button.website-time-picker__option--selected,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] button.website-time-picker__option--selected:hover {
  color: #ffffff;
}

/* Banner / alert ŌĆö light: a soft red tint with dark ink so the title and
   the --txt-soft sub-text both read (the dark theme paints white-on-red). */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-banner {
  color: #14141a;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.14) 0%, rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.08) 100%);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.18),
    0 8px 22px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.12);
}

/* Radio ŌĆö light: the unchecked well darkens so it reads on the light
   surface. The checked state already paints white-on-red, unchanged. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] input[type="radio"]:not(.app-btn) {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ /website/dev showcase ŌĆö light variants ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ
   The dev page reuses these website-dev-* primitives. Each carries a
   light counterpart here so the showcase reads the same way with the
   light theme active ŌĆö dark ink on pale panels, mirroring the dark
   values used above. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-shell {
  color: #14141a;
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-section,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-flat-card {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.035);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-page-title,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-section__title,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-swatch__label,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-card-title,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-banner-strong,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-code {
  color: #14141a;
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-row__label,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-form-label,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-swatch__note,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-meta,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-ref-note {
  color: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.54);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-wash-caption,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-card-lead,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-token-cell--purpose,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-token-cell--value,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-code-mono,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-choice,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-banner-copy,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-ref-list,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-scroll-host {
  color: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.72);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-swatch,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-scroll-host {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-swatch__chip,
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-token-chip {
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-token-chip--missing {
  background:
    repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06) 3px, transparent 3px, transparent 6px);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-token-th {
  color: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.5);
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-code {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07);
}
/* Demonstration text scale flips so each step still reads against the
   light panel. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-text-bright { color: #14141a; }
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-text-soft { color: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.74); }
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-text-mute { color: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.54); }
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-text-faint { color: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.34); }
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-card-eyebrow {
  color: #b91c1c;
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-locked {
  color: rgba(20, 20, 26, 0.72);
  background: #fdfdfe;
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-locked__title {
  color: #14141a;
}
/* Body wash preview swatch ŌĆö light variant. Mirrors the light body wash
   (brighter 232,60,60 red + cool-grey corners over a near-white base),
   amplified the same way the dark preview amplifies the dark wash so the
   glows read clearly inside the small swatch. */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .website-dev-wash-preview {
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at top right, rgba(237, 33, 33, 0.48), transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at bottom left, rgba(237, 33, 33, 0.48), transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at top left, rgba(214, 214, 222, 0.85), transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at bottom right, rgba(214, 214, 222, 0.85), transparent 60%),
    #fdfdfe;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
}

/* ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ
   PUBLIC MARKETING PAGE  (/website)

   Full stylesheet for src/features/website/WebsitePage.js ŌĆö the `.ws-*` class
   family. Everything the customer marketing page needs lives here; the
   page component carries no styling of its own.

   Colours come from the website token system declared higher in this file
   (--txt-bright/soft/mute, --accentText, --website-elev-*) so the whole
   page follows the data-website-theme="light" flip automatically. The
   handful of page-specific tokens below (--ws-*) are declared for the dark
   default on `.ws-page` and re-painted in the light block beneath.
   ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ */

html.website-scope {
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Page tokens ŌĆö dark default ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
/* Card surfaces reuse the custglobal "/website surface elevation" washes
   (--website-elev-*, declared higher in this file) ŌĆö the same frosted-glass
   card language as .website-dev-flat-card. They flip per theme on their
   own, so --ws-card needs no light override. */
html.website-scope .ws-page {
  --ws-card: var(--website-elev-2);
  --ws-card-soft: var(--website-elev-4);
  --ws-line: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10);
  --ws-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55);
  --ws-tint: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.035);
  --ws-nav-bg: rgba(10, 10, 14, 0.86);
  --ws-maxw: 1200px;
  --ws-nav-h: 66px;
  --ws-radius: 18px;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Page tokens ŌĆö light repaint ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .ws-page {
  --ws-line: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12);
  --ws-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12);
  --ws-tint: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.045);
  --ws-nav-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.90);
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Logo theme swap ŌĆö white logo on dark, dark logo on light ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-logo {
  height: 38px;
  width: auto;
  display: block;
}
html.website-scope .ws-logo--light {
  display: none;
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .ws-logo--light {
  display: block;
}
html.website-scope[data-website-theme="light"] .ws-logo--dark {
  display: none;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Layout primitives ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-page {
  color: var(--txt-bright);
}
html.website-scope .ws-container {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: var(--ws-maxw);
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 clamp(18px, 4vw, 40px);
}
html.website-scope .ws-section {
  padding: clamp(56px, 8vw, 104px) 0;
  scroll-margin-top: calc(var(--ws-nav-h) + 16px);
}
html.website-scope .ws-section--tint {
  background: var(--ws-tint);
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Typography ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-eyebrow {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accentText);
}
html.website-scope .ws-h1 {
  font-size: clamp(32px, 5vw, 54px);
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.08;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  margin: 12px 0 0;
  color: var(--txt-bright);
}
html.website-scope .ws-h2 {
  font-size: clamp(26px, 3.4vw, 40px);
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.15;
  letter-spacing: -0.018em;
  margin: 10px 0 0;
  color: var(--txt-bright);
}
html.website-scope .ws-h3 {
  font-size: clamp(20px, 2.4vw, 27px);
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--txt-bright);
}
html.website-scope .ws-lead {
  font-size: clamp(16px, 1.5vw, 19px);
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: var(--txt-soft);
  margin: 16px 0 0;
  max-width: 60ch;
}
html.website-scope .ws-muted {
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.65;
  color: var(--txt-soft);
  margin: 10px 0 0;
}
html.website-scope .ws-head {
  margin-bottom: clamp(28px, 4vw, 48px);
  max-width: 760px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-head--center {
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
  text-align: center;
}
html.website-scope .ws-subhead {
  margin: clamp(40px, 6vw, 72px) 0 24px;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Buttons (anchors styled as CTAs) ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  min-height: 46px;
  padding: 0 22px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.2px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: transform 0.15s ease, background 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
}
html.website-scope .ws-btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
html.website-scope .ws-btn--primary {
  background: var(--accentMain);
  color: var(--onAccentText);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.32);
}
html.website-scope .ws-btn--primary:hover {
  background: var(--primary-hover);
}
html.website-scope .ws-btn--ghost {
  background: var(--ws-card);
  color: var(--txt-bright);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--ws-line);
}
html.website-scope .ws-btn--ghost:hover {
  background: var(--ws-card-soft);
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Top navigation ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-nav {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 50;
  background: var(--ws-nav-bg);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(160%);
  backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(160%);
  box-shadow: 0 1px 0 var(--ws-line);
}
html.website-scope .ws-nav-inner {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: none;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 clamp(12px, 2vw, 28px);
  min-height: var(--ws-nav-h);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 10px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-brand {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
html.website-scope .ws-nav-links {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 3px;
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: visible;
}
@media (min-width: 1280px) {
  html.website-scope .ws-brand {
    position: absolute;
    left: clamp(12px, 2vw, 28px);
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
  }
  html.website-scope .ws-nav-links {
    flex: 0 1 auto;
  }
}
html.website-scope .ws-nav-link {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  padding: 8px clamp(6px, 0.65vw, 12px);
  border-radius: 10px;
  font-size: clamp(11px, 0.82vw, 14px);
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 1;
  color: var(--txt-soft);
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: color 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease;
}
html.website-scope .ws-nav-link:hover {
  color: var(--txt-bright);
  background: var(--ws-tint);
}
html.website-scope .ws-nav-link--active {
  color: var(--accentText);
}
html.website-scope .ws-nav-phone {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  min-height: 38px;
  margin-left: 8px;
  padding: 9px clamp(10px, 0.9vw, 16px);
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: clamp(11px, 0.82vw, 14px);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1;
  color: var(--onAccentText);
  background: var(--accentMain);
  white-space: nowrap;
}
html.website-scope .ws-nav-phone:hover {
  background: var(--primary-hover);
}
html.website-scope .ws-nav-account {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  gap: 8px;
  min-height: 44px;
  margin-left: 4px;
  padding: 9px clamp(10px, 0.9vw, 16px);
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: clamp(11px, 0.78vw, 13px);
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1;
  color: var(--txt-bright);
  background: var(--ws-card);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--ws-line);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
html.website-scope .ws-nav-account:hover {
  color: var(--txt-bright);
  background: var(--ws-tint);
}
html.website-scope .ws-nav-account--profile {
  color: var(--onAccentText);
  background: var(--accentMain);
  box-shadow: none;
}
html.website-scope .ws-nav-account--profile:hover {
  background: var(--primary-hover);
}
html.website-scope .ws-nav-account-avatar {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 22px;
  height: 22px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  line-height: 1;
}
html.website-scope button.ws-nav-toggle {
  display: none;
  appearance: none;
  min-height: 42px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--txt-bright);
  background: var(--ws-card);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--ws-line);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: none;
  backdrop-filter: none;
  cursor: pointer;
}

@media (max-width: 1279px) and (min-width: 641px) {
  html.website-scope .ws-nav-inner {
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }
  html.website-scope .ws-nav-links {
    justify-content: flex-start;
    overflow-x: auto;
    overflow-y: hidden;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
    scrollbar-width: thin;
  }
  html.website-scope .ws-nav-links::-webkit-scrollbar {
    height: 4px;
  }
  html.website-scope .ws-nav-links::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background: var(--ws-line);
    border-radius: 999px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  html.website-scope button.ws-nav-toggle {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-left: auto;
  }
  html.website-scope .ws-nav-links {
    display: none;
    overflow: visible;
  }
  html.website-scope .ws-nav-links--open {
    box-sizing: border-box;
    display: flex;
    width: 100%;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: stretch;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    gap: 2px;
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--ws-nav-h);
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    padding: 12px clamp(18px, 4vw, 40px) 18px;
    background: var(--ws-nav-bg);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(160%);
    backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(160%);
    box-shadow: 0 16px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
  }
  html.website-scope .ws-nav-links--open .ws-nav-link {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }
  html.website-scope .ws-nav-links--open .ws-nav-phone {
    width: 100%;
    margin: 8px 0 0;
    text-align: center;
  }
  html.website-scope .ws-nav-links--open .ws-nav-account {
    width: 100%;
    margin: 8px 0 0;
  }
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Hero ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-hero {
  padding: clamp(40px, 6vw, 80px) 0 clamp(48px, 6vw, 80px);
  scroll-margin-top: var(--ws-nav-h);
}
html.website-scope .ws-hero-inner {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.05fr 0.95fr;
  gap: clamp(28px, 5vw, 64px);
  align-items: center;
}
html.website-scope .ws-hero-ctas {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-top: 28px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-hero-media img {
  width: 100%;
  border-radius: var(--ws-radius);
  box-shadow: var(--ws-shadow);
  display: block;
}
html.website-scope .ws-trust {
  list-style: none;
  margin: clamp(36px, 5vw, 56px) 0 0;
  padding: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-trust-item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 18px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: var(--ws-card);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--ws-line);
  text-align: center;
}
html.website-scope .ws-trust-value {
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--accentText);
}
html.website-scope .ws-trust-label {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--txt-mute);
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Brand strip ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-brands-inner {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 16px 44px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-brands-label {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 1.5px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--txt-mute);
}
html.website-scope .ws-brands-list {
  list-style: none;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 32px;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}
html.website-scope .ws-brands-list img {
  height: 30px;
  width: auto;
  opacity: 0.85;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Grids ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: clamp(16px, 2vw, 24px);
}
html.website-scope .ws-grid--cards {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(min(100%, 280px), 1fr));
}
html.website-scope .ws-grid--steps {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 240px), 1fr));
}
html.website-scope .ws-grid--reviews {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(min(100%, 300px), 1fr));
}
html.website-scope .ws-grid--team {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(min(100%, 200px), 1fr));
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Cards ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
/* Frosted-glass card surface ŌĆö the same recipe as the custglobal
   .website-dev-flat-card: an elevation wash, a backdrop blur, a thin
   specular top highlight, a hairline ring and a soft drop shadow. */
html.website-scope .ws-card {
  background: var(--ws-card);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%);
  backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%);
  border-radius: var(--ws-radius);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08),
    0 0 0 1px var(--ws-line),
    var(--ws-shadow);
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
html.website-scope .ws-card-body {
  padding: 20px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-card-title {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  margin: 2px 0 0;
  color: var(--txt-bright);
}

/* Vehicle / offer / blog media */
html.website-scope .ws-vehicle-media,
html.website-scope .ws-offer-media,
html.website-scope .ws-blog-media {
  position: relative;
  aspect-ratio: 16 / 10;
  background: var(--ws-card-soft);
}
html.website-scope .ws-vehicle-media img,
html.website-scope .ws-offer-media img,
html.website-scope .ws-blog-media img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}
html.website-scope .ws-badge {
  position: absolute;
  top: 12px;
  left: 12px;
  padding: 5px 11px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
  color: var(--onAccentText);
  background: var(--accentMain);
}
html.website-scope .ws-vehicle-brand {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.4px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--txt-mute);
}
html.website-scope .ws-vehicle-price {
  margin: 6px 0 0;
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--accentText);
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Filter tabs ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-tabs {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 28px;
}
html.website-scope button.ws-tab {
  appearance: none;
  min-height: 42px;
  padding: 0 20px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: var(--txt-soft);
  background: var(--ws-card);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--ws-line);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: none;
  backdrop-filter: none;
  transition: background 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease;
}
html.website-scope button.ws-tab:hover {
  color: var(--txt-bright);
}
html.website-scope button.ws-tab.ws-tab--active {
  color: var(--onAccentText);
  background: var(--accentMain);
  box-shadow: none;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Steps ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-step {
  padding: 24px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-step-n {
  font-size: 30px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--accentText);
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Panels & tick lists ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-panel {
  padding: clamp(24px, 3vw, 36px);
}
html.website-scope .ws-sell-panel {
  margin-top: 24px;
  gap: 22px;
  align-items: flex-start;
}
html.website-scope .ws-ticks {
  list-style: none;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 260px), 1fr));
  gap: 10px 24px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-ticks li {
  position: relative;
  padding-left: 28px;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.5;
  color: var(--txt-soft);
}
html.website-scope .ws-ticks li::before {
  content: "Ō£ō";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: -1px;
  width: 20px;
  height: 20px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--onAccentText);
  background: var(--accentMain);
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Split layouts ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-split {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: clamp(28px, 5vw, 60px);
  align-items: center;
}
html.website-scope .ws-split-media img {
  width: 100%;
  border-radius: var(--ws-radius);
  box-shadow: var(--ws-shadow);
  display: block;
}
html.website-scope .ws-split-text > .ws-muted:first-of-type {
  margin-top: 18px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-split-side {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Opening-hours tables ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-hours {
  margin-top: 20px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-hours-caption {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--txt-mute);
  margin: 0 0 6px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-hours-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}
html.website-scope .ws-hours-table th,
html.website-scope .ws-hours-table td {
  padding: 9px 0;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-align: left;
  box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 var(--ws-line);
}
html.website-scope .ws-hours-table th {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--txt-soft);
}
html.website-scope .ws-hours-table td {
  text-align: right;
  color: var(--txt-mute);
}
html.website-scope .ws-hours-table tr:last-child th,
html.website-scope .ws-hours-table tr:last-child td {
  box-shadow: none;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Motability range ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-range {
  padding: 22px;
  gap: 12px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-price-line {
  margin: 18px 0 22px;
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--accentText);
}
html.website-scope .ws-chips {
  list-style: none;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-chip {
  padding: 6px 12px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--txt-soft);
  background: var(--ws-card-soft);
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Timeline ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-timeline {
  list-style: none;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(min(100%, 260px), 1fr));
  gap: clamp(16px, 2vw, 24px);
}
html.website-scope .ws-milestone {
  padding: 22px;
  gap: 8px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-milestone-year {
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--accentText);
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Reviews ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-ratings {
  list-style: none;
  margin: 0 0 32px;
  padding: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 14px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-rating {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 2px;
  padding: 14px 26px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: var(--ws-card);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--ws-line);
}
html.website-scope .ws-rating-score {
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--txt-bright);
}
html.website-scope .ws-stars {
  display: inline-flex;
  gap: 2px;
  font-size: 16px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-star {
  color: var(--txt-faint);
}
html.website-scope .ws-star--on {
  color: var(--accentText);
}
html.website-scope .ws-review {
  padding: 24px;
  gap: 14px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-review-quote {
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: var(--txt-bright);
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
}
html.website-scope .ws-review-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 2px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-review-name {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--txt-bright);
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Team ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-team-group {
  margin-top: clamp(32px, 4vw, 48px);
}
html.website-scope .ws-team-group .ws-h3 {
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-member-photo {
  aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
  background: var(--ws-card-soft);
}
html.website-scope .ws-member-photo img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}
html.website-scope .ws-member .ws-card-body {
  padding: 14px 16px;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Contact ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-contact {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: clamp(20px, 3vw, 32px);
  align-items: stretch;
}
html.website-scope .ws-contact-details {
  gap: 24px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-contact-block {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-contact-phone {
  font-size: 26px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--accentText);
}
html.website-scope .ws-contact-address {
  font-style: normal;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 2px;
  font-size: 15px;
  color: var(--txt-soft);
}
html.website-scope .ws-contact-hours {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 200px), 1fr));
  gap: 8px 28px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-contact-hours .ws-hours {
  margin-top: 0;
}
html.website-scope .ws-socials {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-contact-map {
  min-height: 320px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-contact-map iframe {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 320px;
  border: 0;
  display: block;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Footer ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-footer {
  padding: clamp(40px, 5vw, 64px) 0 32px;
  background: var(--ws-tint);
  box-shadow: 0 1px 0 var(--ws-line) inset;
}
html.website-scope .ws-footer-inner {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-footer-top {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 18px;
  padding-bottom: 8px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-footer-links {
  list-style: none;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px 22px;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}
html.website-scope .ws-footer-links a {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--txt-soft);
}
html.website-scope .ws-footer-links a:hover {
  color: var(--txt-bright);
}
html.website-scope .ws-footer-legal {
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: var(--txt-mute);
  margin: 0;
  max-width: 90ch;
}
html.website-scope .ws-footer-copy {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--txt-faint);
  margin: 6px 0 0;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Responsive ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  html.website-scope .ws-hero-inner,
  html.website-scope .ws-split,
  html.website-scope .ws-contact {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
  html.website-scope .ws-split--reverse .ws-split-text {
    order: -1;
  }
  html.website-scope .ws-sell-panel {
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

/* ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ
   PUBLIC SHOP  (/website#shop, /website/shop/cart, /website/shop/checkout)

   Inherits the .ws-* token system (--ws-card, --ws-line, --ws-radius,
   --txt-bright/soft/mute, --accentMain, --accentText). Same data-website-theme
   light/dark flip applies automatically.
   ŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉŌĢÉ */

html.website-scope .ws-shop-toolbar {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-shop-filters {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-shop-filter {
  padding: 8px 14px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--ws-card);
  color: var(--txt-soft);
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 120ms, color 120ms;
}
html.website-scope .ws-shop-filter--active {
  background: var(--accentMain);
  color: #fff;
}
html.website-scope .ws-shop-cartbutton {
  position: relative;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--accentMain);
  color: #fff;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}
html.website-scope .ws-shop-cartbutton-count {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-left: 6px;
  padding: 1px 8px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Product grid ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
html.website-scope .ws-grid--shop {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 16px;
}
html.website-scope .ws-product {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  background: var(--ws-card);
  border-radius: var(--ws-radius);
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: transform 160ms, box-shadow 160ms;
}
html.website-scope .ws-product:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: var(--ws-shadow);
}
html.website-scope .ws-product-media {
  aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
  background: var(--ws-tint);
  overflow: hidden;
}
html.website-scope .ws-product-media img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}
