html.staff-scope .calendar-api__control,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__control,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api {
  width: 100%;
  padding: var(--control-padding);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: var(--control-gap);
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__control {
  height: var(--dropdown-trigger-height);
  min-height: var(--dropdown-trigger-height);
  max-height: var(--dropdown-trigger-height);
  padding: var(--dropdown-trigger-padding);
  border-radius: var(--dropdown-trigger-radius);
  line-height: 1;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__control,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__control {
  cursor: pointer;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__control:hover:not(:disabled),
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__control:hover:not(:disabled),
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__control:hover:not(:disabled),
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api:hover,
html.staff-scope input:not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"]):not([type="range"]):not([type="file"]):not([type="color"]):not(.searchbar-api__input):hover,
html.staff-scope select:hover,
html.staff-scope textarea:hover {
  background: var(--control-bg-hover) !important;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.is-open .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__control:focus-visible,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__control:focus,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__control:focus-visible,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__control:focus,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__control:focus-visible,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api:focus-within,
html.staff-scope input:not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"]):not([type="range"]):not([type="file"]):not([type="color"]):not(.searchbar-api__input):focus,
html.staff-scope input:not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"]):not([type="range"]):not([type="file"]):not([type="color"]):not(.searchbar-api__input):focus-visible,
html.staff-scope select:focus,
html.staff-scope select:focus-visible,
html.staff-scope textarea:focus,
html.staff-scope textarea:focus-visible {
  outline: none;
  background: var(--control-bg-hover) !important;
  box-shadow: var(--control-ring) !important;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__control:disabled,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__control:disabled,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__control:disabled,
html.staff-scope input:not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"]):not([type="range"]):not([type="file"]):not([type="color"]):disabled,
html.staff-scope select:disabled,
html.staff-scope textarea:disabled {
  opacity: 0.5;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

html.staff-scope .tab-api__item:disabled {
  opacity: 0.5;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Enforcement: global style wins over inline props   === */
/* ========================================================= */
/* Dropdown triggers, calendar/timepicker triggers, and the shared searchbar
   must always render in the secondary-button treatment (accent-tinted bg,
   accent text, no border). `!important` here is intentional ŌĆö it prevents any
   page-level `style={{}}` or CSS module from re-introducing a different look
   or a border. If a variant genuinely needs different sizing, add a modifier
   class (e.g. `.app-topbar-dropdown`) instead of an inline style. */
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__control,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__control,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api {
  /* Trigger wears the Primary-button look via dropdown-dedicated tokens so
     the dropdown stays stable if Primary or --input-bg are later reskinned. */
  background: var(--dropdown-trigger-bg) !important;
  background-image: none !important;
  color: var(--dropdown-trigger-color) !important;
  border: none !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

/* Search bar is locked to the standard 44px control height. Width is
   intentionally NOT constrained here ŌĆö the consumer controls it via the
   wrapper's width / flex props, so the search bar fills whatever column
   it's dropped into.
   Padding is zero so the input fills edge-to-edge; the input itself
   carries a mask-image fade across the curved corners so text fades
   behind the curve instead of being clipped. The clear button still
   lands flush at the far right of the search section. */
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api:hover,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api:focus-within {
  height: var(--control-height) !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  background: var(--theme) !important;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.is-open .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__control:focus-visible,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__control:focus,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__control:focus-visible,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__control:focus,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__control:focus-visible,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api:focus-within {
  background: var(--dropdown-trigger-hover-bg) !important;
  box-shadow: var(--control-ring) !important;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__control:hover:not(:disabled),
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__control:hover:not(:disabled),
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__control:hover:not(:disabled),
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api:hover {
  background: var(--dropdown-trigger-hover-bg) !important;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__value,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__value,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__value {
  color: var(--dropdown-trigger-color) !important;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__chevron,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__icon,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__icon,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api__icon {
  color: var(--dropdown-trigger-color) !important;
}

/* .app-btn variant locks moved to src/styles/families/buttons.css. */

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__value,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__value,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__value {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  min-width: 0;
  text-align: left;
  color: var(--dropdown-trigger-color);
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 1.2;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__value.is-placeholder,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__value.is-placeholder,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__value.is-placeholder {
  color: var(--dropdown-trigger-color);
  opacity: 0.72;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__chevron,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__icon,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__icon,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api__icon {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  color: var(--dropdown-trigger-color);
  transition: transform 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.is-open .dropdown-api__chevron {
  transform: rotate(180deg);
}

/* Compact dropdown variants used inside the top bar ŌĆö keep the secondary-button
   look but shrink padding/font for the dense topbar row. */
html.staff-scope .app-topbar-dropdown .dropdown-api__control {
  height: var(--dropdown-trigger-height);
  min-height: var(--dropdown-trigger-height);
  max-height: var(--dropdown-trigger-height);
  padding: var(--control-padding-xs);
  border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
  font-size: var(--text-caption);
}

html.staff-scope .app-topbar-dropdown--mode .dropdown-api__control {
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}

html.staff-scope .app-topbar-dropdown--status .dropdown-api__control {
  font-size: var(--text-body-sm);
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  html.staff-scope .app-topbar-dropdown--status .dropdown-api__control {
    font-size: var(--text-caption);
  }
}

/* Search result rows inside the status sidebar live on the primary-coloured
   header, so they inherit inverse text and a translucent hover treatment. */
html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__search-result {
  padding: 11px 12px;
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
  color: var(--text-2);
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease;
}
html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__search-result + .status-sidebar__search-result {
  margin-top: 0;
}
html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__search-result:hover,
html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__search-result:focus-visible {
  background: rgba(var(--surface-rgb), 0.12);
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__menu,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__menu,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__menu {
  position: absolute;
  top: calc(100% + 8px);
  left: 0;
  border-radius: var(--control-menu-radius);
  border: none;
  background: var(--dropdown-menu-bg);
  box-shadow: var(--dropdown-menu-shadow);
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__menu {
  width: 100%;
  /* Uniform breathing room: padding on the menu provides the edge gap,
     flex gap provides the inter-row gap ŌĆö so the distance around any
     option is consistent on all four sides. */
  padding: 8px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 8px;
  max-height: 260px;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  /* `overflow-y: overlay` (Chromium) paints the scrollbar on top of the
     content instead of reserving a gutter ŌĆö options stay centred and the
     right-hand gap stops growing. Non-Chromium browsers fall back to auto. */
  overflow-y: auto;
  overflow-y: overlay;
  overscroll-behavior: contain;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  touch-action: pan-y;
  z-index: 1250;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__search {
  padding: 2px;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__search-input {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: var(--control-height-sm);
  padding: var(--control-padding-sm);
  border-radius: var(--control-radius-sm);
  border: none;
  background: var(--control-bg);
  color: var(--text-1);
  font-size: var(--control-font-size);
  line-height: 1.2;
  outline: none;
  box-shadow: none;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__search-input:focus-visible {
  box-shadow: var(--control-ring);
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__menu[hidden] {
  display: none;
}

/* The `button.` prefix is deliberate ŌĆö the base reset
   `button:not(.app-btn) { background: var(--accent-strong) }` at the top of
   staffglobal.css has higher specificity than a bare .dropdown-api__option
   selector. Prefixing keeps specificity in parity so these rules win. */
/* The `button.` prefix is deliberate ŌĆö the base reset
   `button:not(.app-btn) { background: var(--accent-strong) }` at the top of
   staffglobal.css has higher specificity than a bare .dropdown-api__option
   selector. Prefixing keeps specificity in parity so these rules win. */
html.staff-scope button.dropdown-api__option {
  /* Inset from the menu edges via the menu's own padding (8px) and the
     menu's flex-gap (8px between options). Options keep width:100% of the
     padded content area, so they stop short of the menu edge on every
     side ŌĆö matching the "buttons aren't full width" spec. */
  width: 100%;
  min-height: var(--control-height-sm);
  padding: var(--control-padding-sm);
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius-sm);
  /* Non-selected row wears the Primary-style look via dropdown-dedicated
     tokens ŌĆö decoupled from .app-btn--primary / --input-bg / --control-bg
     so Primary can be reskinned without changing dropdown rows. */
  background: var(--dropdown-option-bg);
  text-align: left;
  color: var(--dropdown-option-color);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 4px;
  line-height: 1.2;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope button.dropdown-api__option:hover,
html.staff-scope button.dropdown-api__option:focus-visible {
  background: var(--dropdown-option-hover-bg);
  color: var(--dropdown-option-color);
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope button.dropdown-api__option.is-selected,
html.staff-scope button.dropdown-api__option.is-selected:hover,
html.staff-scope button.dropdown-api__option.is-selected:focus-visible {
  /* Selected row permanently wears the Secondary-style treatment (via
     dropdown-dedicated tokens), visible without needing to hover. */
  background: var(--dropdown-option-selected-bg);
  color: var(--dropdown-option-selected-color);
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__option.is-disabled {
  opacity: 0.55;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__option-label {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  font-weight: 600;
}

html.staff-scope .multiselect-dropdown-api__option .dropdown-api__option-label {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
  padding-left: 30px;
  padding-right: 30px;
}

html.staff-scope select {
  padding: var(--control-padding);
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__option-description,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__helper,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__helper,
html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__helper,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__helper {
  color: var(--control-muted-text);
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__option-description {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__helper,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__helper,
html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__helper,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__helper {
  font-size: 0.8125rem;
  margin-top: 2px;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api__empty {
  padding: 14px 10px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--control-muted-text);
  text-align: center;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.is-disabled .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api.is-disabled .calendar-api__control,
html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api.is-disabled .monthpicker-api__control,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api.is-disabled .timepicker-api__control {
  background: rgba(var(--surface-rgb), 0.5);
}

/* Dropdown, calendar, and timepicker selected rows now consistently
   render in --accentText via their own dedicated tokens, which reads
   fine in both themes ŌĆö no dark-mode override needed. */

html.staff-scope [data-theme="dark"] .dropdown-api__option-description {
  color: var(--control-muted-text);
}

/* scrollbar styles consolidated into .themed-scrollbar block above */

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Multi-Select Dropdown API Styles === */
/* ========================================================= */

/* Multi-select search-bar trigger. Paints --control-bg across the full
   container width. The search input runs edge-to-edge on the left and is
   bounded only by the independent chevron button on the right. */
html.staff-scope .multiselect-dropdown-api .dropdown-api__control {
  height: var(--control-height) !important;
  padding: 0 4px 0 14px !important;
  background: var(--control-bg) !important;
  background-image: none !important;
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  gap: 8px !important;
}

/* !important beats the generic `input[type="search"]` rule (0,1,1) and the
   `input:hover` / `input:focus` rules that would otherwise paint an inner
   box inside the search-bar control. The input should be invisible chrome
   ŌĆö only the parent control paints a background. */
html.staff-scope .multiselect-dropdown-api__search-input,
html.staff-scope .multiselect-dropdown-api__search-input:hover,
html.staff-scope .multiselect-dropdown-api__search-input:focus,
html.staff-scope .multiselect-dropdown-api__search-input:focus-visible {
  border: none !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  background-color: transparent !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  height: 100%;
  color: var(--text-1) !important;
  font-size: var(--control-font-size);
  outline: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope .multiselect-dropdown-api__search-input::placeholder {
  color: var(--control-muted-text);
}

/* Independent chevron button ŌĆö the `button.` prefix beats the global
   `button:not(.app-btn)` reset so the chevron doesn't inherit the solid
   brand button fill. Square hit target, transparent background. */
html.staff-scope button.multiselect-dropdown-api__chevron {
  width: var(--control-height);
  height: var(--control-height);
  min-height: 0;
  padding: 0;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius);
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--dropdown-trigger-color);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope button.multiselect-dropdown-api__chevron:hover:not(:disabled),
html.staff-scope button.multiselect-dropdown-api__chevron:focus-visible {
  background: var(--dropdown-trigger-hover-bg);
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope button.multiselect-dropdown-api__chevron:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.5;
}

/* Option row ŌĆö checkbox on the left, label pushed right with a consistent
   gap. Overrides the parent .dropdown-api__option flex-direction:column. */
html.staff-scope .multiselect-dropdown-api__option {
  flex-direction: row !important;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0;
  position: relative;
  text-align: center;
}

html.staff-scope .multiselect-dropdown-api__checkbox {
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  cursor: pointer;
  accent-color: var(--accent-strong);
  flex-shrink: 0;
  margin: 0;
  position: absolute;
  left: 12px;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  margin-top: auto;
  margin-bottom: auto;
}

html.staff-scope .multiselect-dropdown-api__option:hover .multiselect-dropdown-api__checkbox {
  accent-color: var(--accent-strong);
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Calendar API Styles === */
/* ========================================================= */

html.staff-scope .calendar-api__required,
html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__required,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__required {
  color: var(--accent-strong);
}

html.staff-scope .calendar-api__menu {
  z-index: 1000;
  width: 320px;
  padding: 16px;
  animation: calendar-slide-in 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
}

@keyframes calendar-slide-in {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(-8px);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
}

/* Centre the calendar popup on phone vertical screens */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  html.staff-scope .calendar-api__menu {
    position: fixed;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: calc(100vw - 32px);
    max-width: 320px;
    animation: none;
    z-index: 1250;
  }
}

/* Calendar header ŌĆö the whole [prev | Month Year | next] row is one
   Primary-styled container so it visually matches the Today button width.
   Uses calendar-day tokens (copy-not-link from Primary/Secondary). */
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 4px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  padding: 2px;
  height: var(--control-height);
  background: var(--calendar-day-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-color);
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius);
}

html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  padding-bottom: 12px;
  border-bottom: none;
}

/* Nav buttons sit inside the Primary-styled header ŌĆö transparent so the
   header bg shows through. `button.` prefix beats the global
   `button:not(.app-btn)` reset. */
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__nav-button {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 32px;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 0;
  padding: 0;
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius-sm);
  color: inherit;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__nav-button:hover,
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__nav-button:focus-visible {
  /* Secondary-style hover on the nav buttons so the pressed cell is
     visibly distinct inside the Primary-styled header. */
  background: var(--calendar-day-selected-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-selected-color);
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope .calendar-api__nav-button:active,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__option:active,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__day:active:not(:disabled) {
  transform: scale(0.95);
}

/* Month-year label is a real button so it can toggle the month-year
   picker. Styled transparent so it inherits the header's Primary look;
   `button.` prefix beats the global button reset. */
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__month-year {
  flex: 1;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 0;
  padding: 0 8px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius-sm);
  background: transparent;
  color: inherit;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 1;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__month-year:hover,
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__month-year:focus-visible,
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__month-year[aria-expanded="true"] {
  background: var(--calendar-day-selected-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-selected-color);
  outline: none;
}

/* Month-year picker panel ŌĆö replaces the weekdays/days grid in-place.
   Two columns: 3├Ś4 month grid on the left, scrollable year list on the
   right. Stays on the calendar surface (no extra shadow / no popup) so
   it reads as part of the same panel, not a dropdown. */
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__month-year-picker {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 8px;
  /* Matches the combined height of weekdays (34px) + days grid so the
     popover doesn't jump size when switching views. */
  height: 252px;
}

html.staff-scope .calendar-api__month-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  grid-auto-rows: 1fr;
  gap: 4px;
}

html.staff-scope .calendar-api__year-scroll {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  padding-right: 4px;
  scrollbar-gutter: auto;
}

/* Reuse the slim scrollbar styling from the dropdown ŌĆö same `.themed-scrollbar` family. */
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__year-scroll {
  scrollbar-width: thin;
  scrollbar-color: var(--scrollbar-thumb) transparent;
}
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__year-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__year-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-button { display: none; width: 0; height: 0; }
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__year-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__year-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: var(--scrollbar-thumb);
  border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  background-clip: padding-box;
}
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__year-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: var(--scrollbar-thumb-hover); }

/* Picker cell ŌĆö shares the calendar-day token set so months/years look
   identical to day buttons (Primary resting, Secondary when selected).
   `button.` prefix beats the global button reset. */
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__picker-cell {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0 8px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius);
  background: var(--calendar-day-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-color);
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__picker-cell:hover:not(.is-selected),
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__picker-cell:focus-visible:not(.is-selected) {
  background: var(--calendar-day-hover-bg);
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__picker-cell.is-selected {
  background: var(--calendar-day-selected-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-selected-color);
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* === Month Picker API Styles === */
html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__control {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 4px;
  width: 100%;
  height: var(--control-height);
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 6px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius);
  background: var(--calendar-day-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-color);
  box-shadow: none;
}

html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__control:hover,
html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api.is-open .monthpicker-api__control {
  background: var(--calendar-day-bg);
}

html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api.is-open .monthpicker-api__control {
  box-shadow: var(--control-ring);
}

html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__nav-button,
html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__month-year {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  height: 32px;
  min-height: 32px;
  padding: 0 10px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius-sm);
  background: transparent;
  color: inherit;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 1;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__nav-button {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  min-width: 58px;
}

html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__month-year {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  min-width: 0;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0);
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api.is-empty button.monthpicker-api__month-year {
  color: var(--dropdown-trigger-color);
  opacity: 0.72;
}

html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__nav-button:hover,
html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__nav-button:focus-visible,
html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__month-year:hover,
html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__month-year:focus-visible,
html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__month-year[aria-expanded="true"] {
  background: var(--calendar-day-selected-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-selected-color);
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__nav-button:active,
html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__month-year:active,
html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__picker-cell:active {
  transform: scale(0.95);
}

html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__nav-button:disabled,
html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__month-year:disabled,
html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__picker-cell:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.5;
}

html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__menu {
  position: absolute;
  top: calc(100% + 8px);
  left: 0;
  z-index: 1000;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 8px;
  width: 320px;
  height: 252px;
  padding: 16px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-menu-radius);
  background: var(--dropdown-menu-bg);
  box-shadow: var(--dropdown-menu-shadow);
  animation: calendar-slide-in 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
}

html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__month-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  grid-auto-rows: 1fr;
  gap: 4px;
}

html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__year-scroll {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  padding-right: 4px;
  scrollbar-width: thin;
  scrollbar-color: var(--scrollbar-thumb) transparent;
}

html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__year-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__year-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-button { display: none; width: 0; height: 0; }
html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__year-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__year-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: var(--scrollbar-thumb);
  border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  background-clip: padding-box;
}
html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__year-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: var(--scrollbar-thumb-hover); }

html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__picker-cell {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0 8px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius);
  background: var(--calendar-day-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-color);
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__picker-cell:hover:not(.is-selected),
html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__picker-cell:focus-visible:not(.is-selected) {
  background: var(--calendar-day-hover-bg);
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__picker-cell.is-selected {
  background: var(--calendar-day-selected-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-selected-color);
  font-weight: 600;
}

@media (max-width: 480px) {
  html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__menu {
    position: fixed;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: calc(100vw - 32px);
    max-width: 320px;
    animation: none;
    z-index: 1250;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) and (orientation: portrait) {
  html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api {
    width: min(100%, 260px);
  }

  html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__control {
    gap: 2px;
    padding: 5px;
  }

  html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__nav-button {
    min-width: 46px;
    padding-inline: 8px;
  }

  html.staff-scope button.monthpicker-api__month-year {
    padding-inline: 8px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .monthpicker-api__menu {
    width: min(calc(100vw - 56px), 288px);
    max-width: 288px;
    padding: 12px;
  }
}

html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__display {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text-1);
}

/* Today button ŌĆö Primary at rest, Secondary on hover / focus / active,
   all via the calendar-day tokens (copy-not-link). `button.` prefix beats
   the global button reset. */
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__today-button {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: var(--control-height);
  max-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: var(--control-padding-sm);
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius);
  background: var(--calendar-day-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-color);
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__today-button:hover,
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__today-button:focus-visible,
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__today-button:active {
  background: var(--calendar-day-selected-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-selected-color);
  outline: none;
}

/* `button.` prefix beats the global `button:not(.app-btn)` reset so the
   dedicated --timepicker-now-* tokens win. Locked at 44px. */
html.staff-scope button.timepicker-api__now-button {
  height: var(--control-height);
  max-height: var(--control-height);
  min-height: 0;
  padding: 0 var(--space-md);
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius);
  background: var(--timepicker-now-bg);
  color: var(--timepicker-now-color);
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope button.timepicker-api__now-button:hover,
html.staff-scope button.timepicker-api__now-button:focus-visible {
  background: var(--timepicker-now-hover-bg);
  color: var(--timepicker-now-color);
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope .calendar-api__weekdays {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
  gap: 4px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

html.staff-scope .calendar-api__weekday {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 8px 0;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--control-muted-text);
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

html.staff-scope .calendar-api__days {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
  gap: 4px;
}

/* The `button.` prefix is deliberate ŌĆö the base reset
   `button:not(.app-btn) { background: var(--accent-strong) }` has higher
   specificity than a bare `.calendar-api__day` selector. Prefixing keeps
   specificity in parity so the calendar-day tokens win.
   Each day is independent from the .app-btn family and seats itself
   inside its grid column via the parent .calendar-api__days 7-col grid. */
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__day {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  aspect-ratio: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  padding: 0;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius-sm);
  /* Unselected day wears the current Primary-button look via dedicated
     tokens. Reskinning Primary later won't ripple in. */
  background: var(--calendar-day-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-color);
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__day--empty {
  visibility: hidden;
  pointer-events: none;
}

html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__day:hover:not(:disabled):not(.is-selected),
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__day:focus-visible:not(:disabled):not(.is-selected) {
  background: var(--calendar-day-hover-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-color);
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__day.is-selected {
  /* Selected day wears the current Secondary-button look (stronger tint +
     accent text) via dedicated tokens. */
  background: var(--calendar-day-selected-bg);
  color: var(--calendar-day-selected-color);
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* Tab-api active wears the Secondary-button look via dedicated tab
   tokens. `button.` / `a.` prefix beats the global button/anchor resets. */
html.staff-scope button.tab-api__item.is-active,
html.staff-scope button.tab-api__item.is-active:hover,
html.staff-scope button.tab-api__item.is-active:focus-visible,
html.staff-scope a.tab-api__item.is-active,
html.staff-scope a.tab-api__item.is-active:hover,
html.staff-scope a.tab-api__item.is-active:focus-visible {
  background: var(--tab-button-selected-bg);
  color: var(--tab-button-selected-color);
  font-weight: 600;
}

html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__day.is-today:not(.is-selected) {
  /* "Today" at rest has no border or special marker ŌĆö it looks like any
     other Primary-styled day. The Secondary treatment kicks in only when
     the day is actually picked (.is-selected). */
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* Weekend + bank-holiday colouring. Applied as text colour only so the
   Primary-styled day cell bg remains consistent; only the numeral shifts
   into the danger/warning tone. When the cell is selected, Secondary
   takes over and these text colours step aside via :not(.is-selected). */
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__day.is-sunday:not(.is-selected):not(:disabled),
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__day.is-bank-holiday:not(.is-selected):not(:disabled) {
  color: var(--danger-text);
}

html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__day.is-saturday:not(.is-selected):not(:disabled) {
  color: var(--warning-text);
}

/* Weekday-header tint mirrors the column below it. */
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__weekday.is-sunday {
  color: var(--danger-text);
}
html.staff-scope .calendar-api__weekday.is-saturday {
  color: var(--warning-text);
}

html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__day.is-highlighted:not(.is-selected) {
  background: var(--calendar-day-hover-bg);
}

html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__day:disabled,
html.staff-scope button.calendar-api__day.is-disabled {
  color: var(--text-1);
  opacity: 0.3;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

html.staff-scope [data-theme="dark"] .calendar-api__today-button {
  background: var(--theme-hover);
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Time Picker API Styles === */
/* ========================================================= */

html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__menu {
  z-index: 1000;
  width: 280px;
  padding: 16px;
  animation: timepicker-slide-in 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
}

@keyframes timepicker-slide-in {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(-8px);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
}

html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__selectors {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
}

html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__column {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 8px;
}

html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__column--period {
  flex: 0 0 60px;
}

html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__column-label {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--control-muted-text);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 4px 0;
}

html.staff-scope .timepicker-api__options {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
  max-height: 180px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding: 4px;
}

/* `button.` prefix keeps specificity in parity with the global
   `button:not(.app-btn)` reset so the timepicker-option tokens win. */
html.staff-scope button.timepicker-api__option {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  height: var(--control-height);
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0 8px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius-sm);
  /* Resting state wears the Primary-button look via dedicated tokens. */
  background: var(--timepicker-option-bg);
  color: var(--timepicker-option-color);
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  cursor: pointer;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope button.timepicker-api__option:hover:not(.is-selected),
html.staff-scope button.timepicker-api__option:focus-visible:not(.is-selected) {
  background: var(--timepicker-option-hover-bg);
  color: var(--timepicker-option-color);
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope button.timepicker-api__option.is-selected,
html.staff-scope button.timepicker-api__option.is-selected:hover,
html.staff-scope button.timepicker-api__option.is-selected:focus-visible {
  /* Selected wears the Secondary-button look via dedicated tokens. */
  background: var(--timepicker-option-selected-bg);
  color: var(--timepicker-option-selected-color);
  font-weight: 600;
  outline: none;
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Shared Field Surface === */
/* ========================================================= */

html.staff-scope textarea {
  /* Manual drag-resize is disabled app-wide ŌĆö textareas size themselves.
     Form / notes fields (.app-input--textarea) auto-grow line-by-line via
     field-sizing; see src/styles/families/inputs.css. !important locks this
     over any legacy inline `resize` values still present in page files. */
  resize: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope input[type="search"]::-webkit-search-decoration,
html.staff-scope input[type="search"]::-webkit-search-cancel-button,
html.staff-scope input[type="search"]::-webkit-search-results-button,
html.staff-scope input[type="search"]::-webkit-search-results-decoration {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Search Bar API === */
/* ========================================================= */

/* Covers default, hover, focus, and focus-visible so the generic
   `input:hover` / `input:focus` rules higher in this file can't paint a
   background, ring, or rounded inner rectangle over the typed text.
   `position: relative; z-index: 2` lifts the actual text characters to
   the top of the local stacking context so nothing in the search bar
   can render on top of them. */
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api__input,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api__input:hover,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api__input:focus,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api__input:focus-visible {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  width: 100%;
  min-width: 0;
  height: var(--control-height) !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  border: none !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  background-color: transparent !important;
  color: var(--text-1) !important;
  font-size: var(--control-font-size);
  font-weight: var(--control-font-weight);
  outline: none !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  /* Initial text starts inset past the fade zone so short values read
     cleanly. As the user types past the right edge, the input scrolls
     natively and earlier characters pass under the left fade. */
  text-indent: 22px;
  /* Fade text into/out of the rounded corner zone (14px = --control-radius)
     instead of clipping at the input edge. Native horizontal scroll on the
     input is preserved ŌĆö only the visual edge is faded. */
  -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0, #000 var(--control-radius), #000 calc(100% - 8px), transparent 100%);
  mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0, #000 var(--control-radius), #000 calc(100% - 8px), transparent 100%);
}

html.staff-scope .searchbar-api__input::-webkit-search-decoration,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api__input::-webkit-search-cancel-button,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api__input::-webkit-search-results-button,
html.staff-scope .searchbar-api__input::-webkit-search-results-decoration {
  display: none;
  -webkit-appearance: none;
}

html.staff-scope .searchbar-api__input::placeholder {
  color: var(--control-muted-text);
  opacity: 1;
}

/* Clear button. Independent from the .app-btn family and intentionally
   chromeless ŌĆö no background, no border, no radius, just the ├Ś icon
   sitting at the far right of the search bar. 44px hit target so it's
   still easy to tap. `button.` prefix beats the global
   `button:not(.app-btn)` reset that would otherwise paint it brand accent. */
html.staff-scope button.searchbar-api__clear {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  height: var(--control-height);
  width: var(--control-height);
  max-height: var(--control-height);
  min-height: 0;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 0;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--text-1);
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  line-height: 1;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: opacity 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope button.searchbar-api__clear:disabled {
  visibility: hidden;
  pointer-events: none;
}

html.staff-scope button.searchbar-api__clear:hover:not(:disabled),
html.staff-scope button.searchbar-api__clear:focus-visible {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--accentText);
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__searchbar {
  background: var(--secondary);
  color: var(--accentText);
  box-shadow: none;
  padding-right: 48px;
}

html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__searchbar:hover,
html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__searchbar:focus-within {
  background: var(--secondary-hover);
  box-shadow: none;
}

html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__searchbar .searchbar-api__input,
html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__searchbar-input {
  color: var(--text-1);
  padding-right: 58px !important;
}

html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__searchbar .searchbar-api__input::placeholder,
html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__searchbar-input::placeholder {
  color: var(--text-1);
}

html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__searchbar .searchbar-api__clear {
  background: var(--surface);
  color: var(--text-1);
}

html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__searchbar .searchbar-api__clear:hover,
html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__searchbar .searchbar-api__clear:focus-visible {
  background: var(--secondary-hover);
  color: var(--text-1);
}

html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__search-submit {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  right: 6px;
  width: var(--control-height);
  height: var(--control-height);
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius);
  background: var(--primary);
  color: var(--text-2);
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease, transform 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__search-submit:hover,
html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__search-submit:focus-visible {
  background: var(--primary-selected);
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__search-submit:active {
  transform: translateY(-50%) scale(0.96);
}

html.staff-scope .status-sidebar__search-submit svg {
  width: 17px;
  height: 17px;
  fill: currentColor;
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Semantic Utility Overrides === */
/* ========================================================= */

html.staff-scope [class*="text-rose-"],
html.staff-scope [class*="text-red-"] {
  color: var(--dangerMain) !important;
}

html.staff-scope [class*="text-amber-"],
html.staff-scope [class*="text-yellow-"],
html.staff-scope [class*="text-orange-"] {
  color: var(--warningMain) !important;
}

html.staff-scope [class*="text-green-"] {
  color: var(--successMain) !important;
}

html.staff-scope [class*="text-slate-"],
html.staff-scope [class*="text-gray-"] {
  color: var(--surfaceTextMuted) !important;
}

html.staff-scope [class*="bg-black/"] {
  background-color: var(--overlay) !important;
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Tab API === */
/* ========================================================= */

html.staff-scope .tab-api {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  /* 4px padding + 35px tab + 4px padding keeps the strip inside the 44px
     tab background while leaving a little breathing room around the buttons. */
  gap: 6px;
  padding: 4px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  height: 44px;
  min-height: 44px;
  align-items: center;
  border-radius: var(--control-radius);
  background: var(--tab-container-bg);
  border: none;
}

html.staff-scope .page-surface-plain {
  background: var(--surface);
  border: none;
  border-radius: 0;
  box-shadow: none;
  padding: 0;
}

html.staff-scope .tab-scroll-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 6px;
  width: 100%;
  overflow-x: auto;
  overflow-y: hidden;
  scrollbar-width: none;
  -ms-overflow-style: none;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  flex: 1;
  cursor: default;
}

html.staff-scope .tab-scroll-row.is-overflowing {
  justify-content: flex-start;
  padding-bottom: 6px;
  cursor: grab;
}

html.staff-scope .tab-api--grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px, 1fr));
}

html.staff-scope .tab-api--stretch .tab-api__item {
  width: 100%;
}

html.staff-scope .tab-api--inline {
  display: inline-flex;
  width: fit-content;
  max-width: 100%;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

/* `button.` / `a.` prefix so the rule beats the global `button:not(.app-btn)`
   reset and browser anchor defaults ŌĆö tab items render as either. The
   height is dedicated to the tab family (35px, independent of the global
   control-height scale), but corner radius is borrowed from --control-radius
   so tabs share the button-family shape. */
html.staff-scope button.tab-api__item,
html.staff-scope a.tab-api__item {
  height: 35px;
  min-height: 35px !important;
  padding: 0 var(--space-sm);
  /* Matches .app-btn's corner radius so tabs share the Primary button shape. */
  border-radius: var(--control-radius) !important;
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
  white-space: nowrap;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 1;
  border: none;
  /* Resting state wears Primary-style via dedicated tab tokens. */
  background: var(--tab-button-bg);
  color: var(--tab-button-color);
  box-shadow: none;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition:
    background-color 0.18s ease,
    color 0.18s ease,
    box-shadow 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope button.tab-api__item:hover:not(:disabled):not(.is-active),
html.staff-scope a.tab-api__item:hover:not(.is-active) {
  background: var(--tab-button-hover-bg);
  color: var(--tab-button-color);
}

html.staff-scope button.tab-api__item:focus-visible:not(.is-active),
html.staff-scope a.tab-api__item:focus-visible:not(.is-active) {
  outline: none;
  background: var(--tab-button-hover-bg);
  box-shadow: var(--control-ring);
}

html.staff-scope .tab-api__item.is-active:focus-visible {
  outline: none;
  box-shadow: var(--control-ring);
}

html.staff-scope .tab-api__item[data-tone="default"] {
  border: none;
}

html.staff-scope .tab-api__item[data-tone="success"] {
  border: none;
  background: var(--success-surface);
  color: var(--success-dark);
}

html.staff-scope .tab-api__item[data-tone="success"].is-active {
  background: var(--success);
  color: var(--text-2);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-manager-shell {
  min-height: calc(100vh - 40px);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-manager-tabs-row {
  justify-content: flex-start;
  padding: 0 2px;
  overflow-x: auto;
  overflow-y: hidden;
  scrollbar-width: none;
  -ms-overflow-style: none;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-manager-tabs-row::-webkit-scrollbar {
  display: none;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-manager-tabs-row.is-overflowing {
  justify-content: flex-start;
  padding-bottom: 0;
  cursor: default;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-manager-tabs-row .tab-api {
  flex: 0 0 max-content;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  width: max-content;
  max-width: none;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-manager-tabs-row .tab-api__item {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  min-width: max-content;
  padding: 10px 8px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  line-height: 1;
  white-space: nowrap;
  word-break: normal;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-manager-tab-panel {
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 20px;
  background: transparent;
  border: 0;
  box-shadow: none;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-manager-tab-content {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 20px;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-manager-tab-content > .app-page-stack {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
  padding: 8px 0;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-manager-tab-content .app-section-card {
  padding: 0;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 0;
  background: transparent;
  box-shadow: none;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-manager-tab-content .app-page-stack > .app-section-card,
html.staff-scope .hr-manager-tab-content .app-page-stack > section > .app-section-card,
html.staff-scope .hr-manager-tab-content .app-page-stack > div > .app-section-card {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-topbar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-end;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-topbar-copy {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
  min-width: 0;
  flex: 1 1 320px;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-kicker {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-1);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: var(--text-label);
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking-caps);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-heading {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--accent-strong);
  font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 2vw, 2rem);
  line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-subtitle {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-1);
  max-width: 720px;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.45fr) minmax(320px, 0.95fr);
  gap: 24px;
  align-items: start;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-directory-shell {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-width: 0;
  width: 100%;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-directory-card {
  gap: 16px;
  min-width: 0;
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--theme);
  border: none;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-directory-toolbar {
  display: flex;
  gap: 12px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-directory-actions {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: 12px;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
}

/* .hr-employees-add-button + helpers removed ŌĆö HR Employees tab now uses the global <Button> component. */

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-search {
  position: relative;
  min-width: 260px;
  flex: 1 1 320px;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-search-input {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 11px 126px 11px 14px;
  border-radius: var(--input-radius);
  border: none;
  background: var(--theme);
  color: var(--text-1);
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-search-input:focus {
  border-color: transparent;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(var(--accent-base-rgb), 0.12);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-search-meta {
  position: absolute;
  right: 12px;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: var(--text-1);
  pointer-events: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-summary-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 10px;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-summary-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  border: none;
  background: var(--theme);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-summary-label {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--text-1);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-summary-value {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  color: var(--text-1);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-list {
  width: 100%;
  min-width: 0;
  max-width: 100%;
  display: block;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  overflow-y: hidden;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: var(--surface);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table {
  width: 100%;
  min-width: 0;
  table-layout: fixed;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table.app-table-shell {
  min-width: 0;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table th,
html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table td {
  white-space: normal;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table th:nth-child(1),
html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table td:nth-child(1) {
  width: 64%;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table th:nth-child(2),
html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table td:nth-child(2) {
  width: 18%;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table th:nth-child(3),
html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table td:nth-child(3) {
  width: 18%;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-list.app-table-shell-wrap,
html.staff-scope .hr-employees-list.app-table-shell-scroll {
  min-width: 0;
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  overflow-y: hidden;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table-row {
  cursor: pointer;
  outline: none;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table-row:hover td,
html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table-row:focus-visible td {
  background: var(--theme-hover, rgba(var(--accent-base-rgb), 0.08)) !important;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table-row.is-selected td {
  background: rgba(var(--accent-base-rgb), 0.12) !important;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-empty-row {
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--text-1);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-person-cell {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  min-width: 0;
  width: 100%;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table .hr-employees-row-avatar {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  flex: 0 0 32px;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table .hr-employees-row-body {
  gap: 2px;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table .hr-employees-row-header {
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 2px;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table .hr-employees-row-name {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table .hr-employees-row-email {
  font-size: 0.76rem;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table .hr-employees-row-role,
html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table .hr-employees-row-meta {
  display: none;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table .hr-employees-row-end {
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 0;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-table .hr-employees-row-chevron {
  display: none;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row {
  cursor: pointer;
  text-align: left;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 18px;
  border-radius: 18px;
  border: none;
  background: rgba(var(--surface-rgb), 0.88);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 52px minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: 16px;
  align-items: center;
  transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row:hover,
html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row:focus-visible {
  background: rgba(var(--surface-rgb), 0.95);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
  box-shadow: 0 0 28px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row:focus-visible {
  outline: none;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(var(--accent-base-rgb), 0.12);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row.is-selected {
  background: rgba(var(--primary-rgb), 0.14);
  box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(var(--primary-rgb), 0.12);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-avatar {
  width: 52px;
  height: 52px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-full);
  background: rgba(var(--primary-rgb), 0.2);
  color: var(--primary);
  font-weight: 800;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: none;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
  min-width: 0;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 10px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-name {
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text-1);
  font-size: 1.02rem;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-email,
html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-role,
html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-meta {
  color: var(--text-1);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-email {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-role {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text-1);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px 10px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-meta span {
  padding: 4px 8px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
  background: rgba(var(--grey-accent-rgb), 0.12);
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-badges {
  display: flex;
  gap: 6px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-end {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-chevron {
  color: var(--text-1);
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-detail-panel {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  overflow: visible;
  align-self: start;
  padding: 0;
  border-radius: 0;
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
  box-shadow: none;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employees-detail-panel .app-section-card,
html.staff-scope .hr-employees-detail-panel [data-dev-section-type="content-card"] {
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
  box-shadow: none;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employee-profile-header-card {
  border-bottom: none;
  padding: 0 0 20px 0 !important;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employee-profile-sections {
  gap: 14px !important;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employee-card-block {
  border-radius: 16px;
  background: var(--surface) !important;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 16px !important;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employee-basic-salary-card {
  background: var(--surface) !important;
  border: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employee-key-value {
  padding: 10px 0;
  border-bottom: none;
}

html.staff-scope .hr-employee-key-value:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  html.staff-scope .hr-employees-layout {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  html.staff-scope .hr-employees-detail-panel {
    position: static;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 720px) {
  html.staff-scope .hr-employees-directory-actions {
    width: auto;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .hr-employees-summary-row {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row {
    grid-template-columns: 44px minmax(0, 1fr);
  }

  html.staff-scope .hr-employees-row-end {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
    flex-direction: row;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding-top: 4px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .hr-employees-search-input {
    padding-right: 14px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .hr-employees-search-meta {
    position: static;
    display: block;
    transform: none;
    margin-top: 8px;
  }
}

html.staff-scope .tab-api__item[data-tone="warning"] {
  border: none;
  background: var(--warning-surface);
  color: var(--warning-dark);
}

html.staff-scope .tab-api__item[data-tone="warning"].is-active {
  background: var(--warning);
  color: var(--text-2);
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api--sm .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api--sm .calendar-api__control,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api--sm .timepicker-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.compact-picker .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api.compact-picker .calendar-api__control,
html.staff-scope .timepicker-api.compact-picker .timepicker-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.job-request-payment-dropdown .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.edit-requests-payment-dropdown .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.start-job-request-dropdown .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.history-reg-dropdown .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.prepick-popup-dropdown .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.leave-modal-field .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api.leave-modal-field .calendar-api__control {
  min-height: var(--dropdown-trigger-height-sm);
  padding: var(--dropdown-trigger-padding-sm);
  border-radius: var(--dropdown-trigger-radius-sm);
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api--sm .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.compact-picker .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.job-request-payment-dropdown .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.edit-requests-payment-dropdown .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.start-job-request-dropdown .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.history-reg-dropdown .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.prepick-popup-dropdown .dropdown-api__control,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.leave-modal-field .dropdown-api__control {
  height: var(--dropdown-trigger-height);
  min-height: var(--dropdown-trigger-height);
  max-height: var(--dropdown-trigger-height);
}

html.staff-scope .popup-card .calendar-api__menu,
html.staff-scope .calendar-api.leave-modal-field .calendar-api__menu {
  position: fixed;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  z-index: 1250;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.job-request-payment-dropdown {
  width: 160px;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.start-job-request-dropdown,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.efficiency-request-dropdown {
  width: 100%;
}

html.staff-scope .calendar-api.efficiency-filter-calendar,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.efficiency-tech-filter-dropdown,
html.staff-scope .compact-dropdown,
html.staff-scope .compact-calendar {
  width: fit-content;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.efficiency-request-dropdown .dropdown-api__menu {
  max-height: 144px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.efficiency-tech-filter-dropdown .dropdown-api__menu {
  min-width: 100%;
  width: max-content;
}

html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.start-job-request-dropdown .dropdown-api__option-description,
html.staff-scope .dropdown-api.efficiency-request-dropdown .dropdown-api__option-description {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  width: fit-content;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
  border: none;
  color: var(--success);
  background: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.08);
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

/* scrollbar styles consolidated into .themed-scrollbar block above */

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Table API ŌĆö curved rows matching control style     === */
/* ========================================================= */

html.staff-scope .table-api {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: separate;
  border-spacing: 0 8px;
  min-width: 0;
}

html.staff-scope .table-api thead tr th {
  padding: 8px 12px;
  text-align: left;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text-1);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

html.staff-scope .table-api tbody tr td {
  padding: 12px;
  background: var(--surface);
  color: var(--text-1);
  font-size: var(--control-font-size);
  vertical-align: middle;
  border: none;
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope .table-api tbody tr td:first-child {
  border-radius: var(--control-radius) 0 0 var(--control-radius);
  padding-left: 14px;
}

html.staff-scope .table-api tbody tr td:last-child {
  border-radius: 0 var(--control-radius) var(--control-radius) 0;
  padding-right: 14px;
}

html.staff-scope .table-api tbody tr:hover td {
  background: var(--theme);
}

html.staff-scope [data-theme="dark"] .table-api tbody tr td {
  background: var(--surface);
}

html.staff-scope [data-theme="dark"] .table-api tbody tr:hover td {
  background: var(--theme-hover);
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === VHC Parts Identified table (scoped clone of .table-api)
       Independent from the global rules so row backgrounds and
       per-row tints can be tuned without touching every table.   */
/* ========================================================= */
html.staff-scope .vhc-parts-identified-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  min-width: 0;
  font-size: 12px;
}

html.staff-scope .vhc-parts-identified-table thead tr th {
  padding: 12px;
  text-align: left;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--info);
  background: var(--theme);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

html.staff-scope .vhc-parts-identified-table thead tr th:first-child {
  padding-left: 14px;
}

html.staff-scope .vhc-parts-identified-table thead tr th:last-child {
  padding-right: 14px;
}

html.staff-scope .vhc-parts-identified-table tbody tr {
  background: var(--surface);
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope .vhc-parts-identified-table tbody tr td {
  padding: 12px;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--text-1);
  vertical-align: middle;
  border: none;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--theme);
  transition: background-color 0.18s ease;
}

html.staff-scope .vhc-parts-identified-table tbody tr td:first-child {
  padding-left: 14px;
}

html.staff-scope .vhc-parts-identified-table tbody tr td:last-child {
  padding-right: 14px;
}

/* Expanded "Add Part" panel that opens beneath a clicked Parts Identified row.
   Styles only the surrounding background/frame ŌĆö the inner table and buttons
   keep their existing inline styles. */
html.staff-scope .vhc-parts-identified-expanded {
  padding: 20px 24px 24px;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--theme);
  /* background is set inline per-row to match the clicked row's hover colour */
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Global Table Shells                                 === */
/* ========================================================= */

/* Unified table look ŌĆö sourced from the profile work-attendance-history table.
   Tables receive `.app-table-shell--with-headings` (thead present) or
   `.app-table-shell--rows-only` (no thead) automatically via GlobalTableShells.
   Rules are intentionally strong so individual pages inherit the shared look
   without every table needing to be rewritten. */

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell-wrap {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  overflow: hidden;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell-scroll {
  border: none;
  background: var(--surface);
  isolation: isolate;
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
  position: relative;
  --app-table-heading-mask-height: 44px;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell-scroll:has(.app-table-shell--with-headings)::before {
  content: "";
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  display: block;
  height: var(--app-table-heading-mask-height);
  margin-bottom: calc(var(--app-table-heading-mask-height) * -1);
  background: var(--secondary-pressed);
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 35;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell {
  width: 100%;
  color: var(--text-1);
  background: var(--surface) !important;
  background-image: none !important;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  overflow: hidden;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell th,
html.staff-scope .app-table-shell td {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  background-clip: padding-box;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  vertical-align: middle !important;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
  word-break: normal;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

/* Enforced paddings so every table shares the same rhythm. */
html.staff-scope .app-table-shell thead th {
  padding: 12px 10px !important;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell tbody td {
  padding: 12px 10px !important;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell thead th:first-child,
html.staff-scope .app-table-shell tbody td:first-child {
  padding-left: 14px !important;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell thead th:last-child,
html.staff-scope .app-table-shell tbody td:last-child {
  padding-right: 14px !important;
}

/* ---------- With headings ---------- */
html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--with-headings {
  border-collapse: separate !important;
  border-spacing: 0 !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--with-headings thead {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 40;
  background: var(--secondary-pressed);
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--with-headings thead th {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 41;
  background: var(--secondary-pressed) !important;
  background-image: none !important;
  background-clip: padding-box;
  color: var(--text-1) !important;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  border-bottom: none !important;
  line-height: 1.2;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb, 122, 92, 250), 0.16) !important;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--with-headings thead th > * {
  vertical-align: middle;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--with-headings thead th:first-child {
  padding-left: 14px;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--with-headings thead th:last-child {
  padding-right: 14px;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--with-headings tbody tr {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 0;
  background: var(--surface) !important;
  background-image: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--with-headings tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
  background: var(--surface, var(--surface)) !important;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--with-headings tbody td {
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb, 122, 92, 250), 0.12) !important;
  border-bottom: none !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  background-image: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--with-headings tbody td:first-child {
  padding-left: 14px;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--with-headings tbody td:last-child {
  padding-right: 14px;
}

/* ---------- Rows only (no thead) ŌĆö same body look as attendance history ---------- */
html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--rows-only {
  border-collapse: separate !important;
  border-spacing: 0 !important;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--rows-only tbody tr {
  background: var(--surface) !important;
  background-image: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--rows-only tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
  background: var(--surface, var(--surface)) !important;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--rows-only tbody td {
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb, 122, 92, 250), 0.12) !important;
  border-bottom: none !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  background-image: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--rows-only tbody tr:first-child td {
  border-top: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--rows-only tbody td:first-child {
  padding-left: 14px;
}

html.staff-scope .app-table-shell--rows-only tbody td:last-child {
  padding-right: 14px;
}

/* ---------- Dark theme ---------- */
html.staff-scope [data-theme="dark"] .app-table-shell,
html.staff-scope [data-theme="dark"] .app-table-shell-scroll {
  border-color: rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb, 122, 92, 250), 0.2);
}

html.staff-scope [data-theme="dark"] .app-table-shell--with-headings tbody tr:nth-child(even),
html.staff-scope [data-theme="dark"] .app-table-shell--rows-only tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
  background: var(--surface) !important;
}

/* ---------- Mobile / vertical phone view ----------
   Tables stay tabular but become horizontally scrollable inside their wrapper
   and use tighter spacing + smaller type so columns don't squash or clip. */
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell-wrap,
  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell-scroll {
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
    overflow-x: auto;
    max-width: 100%;
  }

  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell {
    /* Keep cells at a legible min-size and let the wrapper scroll horizontally. */
    min-width: max-content;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm, 10px);
  }

  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell th,
  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell td {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell thead th {
    padding: 10px 8px !important;
    font-size: 0.66rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  }

  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell tbody td {
    padding: 10px 8px !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell thead th:first-child,
  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell tbody td:first-child {
    padding-left: 12px !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell thead th:last-child,
  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell tbody td:last-child {
    padding-right: 12px !important;
  }

  /* Pills, status tags, and action buttons inside cells often force fixed
     widths ŌĆö clamp them so a single row still fits neatly on narrow screens. */
  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell td .app-btn,
  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell td button {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    padding: 6px 10px;
  }

  /* Subtle scroll hint on the wrapper so the user knows more content exists. */
  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell-scroll {
    scrollbar-width: thin;
  }

  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar {
    height: 6px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb, 122, 92, 250), 0.25);
    border-radius: 999px;
  }
}

/* Slightly tighter rhythm on small tablets / large phones in landscape. */
@media (min-width: 641px) and (max-width: 860px) {
  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell th,
  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell td {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
  }

  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell thead th {
    padding: 10px 9px !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .app-table-shell tbody td {
    padding: 10px 9px !important;
  }
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Login Page Responsive Styles === */
/* ========================================================= */

/* iPad Pro 12.9" and similar large tablets (portrait & landscape) */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  html.staff-scope .login-page-wrapper {
    padding: 48px 24px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-stack {
    max-width: 600px;
    gap: 20px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack {
    max-width: 480px;
    gap: 20px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-logo {
    width: 400px;
  }
}

/* iPad and tablets (portrait & landscape) */
@media (max-width: 820px) {
  html.staff-scope .login-page-wrapper {
    padding: 40px 20px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-stack {
    max-width: 100%;
    gap: 18px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack {
    max-width: 100%;
    gap: 18px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-logo {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 380px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-brand {
    padding-bottom: 12px;
  }

  /* Adjust card padding for tablets */
  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack > div > div {
    padding: 1.75rem;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-form {
    gap: 18px;
  }
}

/* iPhone landscape and small tablets */
@media (max-width: 768px) and (orientation: landscape) {
  html.staff-scope .login-page-wrapper {
    padding: 24px 16px;
    min-height: auto;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-stack {
    gap: 16px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack {
    gap: 16px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-logo {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 280px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-brand {
    padding-bottom: 8px;
  }

  /* Reduce card padding in landscape */
  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack > div > div {
    padding: 1.5rem;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-form {
    gap: 16px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-inner {
    gap: 16px;
  }
}

/* iPhone and mobile devices (portrait) */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  html.staff-scope .login-page-wrapper {
    padding: 32px 16px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-stack {
    gap: 16px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack {
    gap: 16px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-logo {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 300px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-brand {
    padding-bottom: 10px;
  }

  /* Adjust card styling for mobile */
  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack > div > div {
    padding: 1.5rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-form {
    gap: 16px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-inner {
    gap: 16px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-input,
  html.staff-scope .login-select {
    padding: 11px 14px;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-label {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
  }

  /* Adjust title sizes for mobile */
  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack h2 {
    font-size: 1.3rem;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack p {
    font-size: 0.88rem;
  }
}

/* iPhone SE and small devices (portrait) */
@media (max-width: 375px) {
  html.staff-scope .login-page-wrapper {
    padding: 24px 12px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-logo {
    max-width: 260px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack > div > div {
    padding: 1.25rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-input,
  html.staff-scope .login-select {
    padding: 10px 12px;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack h2 {
    font-size: 1.2rem;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack p {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) and (orientation: portrait) {
  html.staff-scope .login-page-wrapper {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    gap: 14px;
    padding: max(12px, env(safe-area-inset-top)) 12px max(18px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-center-stage {
    order: 1;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 420px;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-identity-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-dev-panel {
    order: 2;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 420px;
    height: auto;
    max-height: none;
    margin: 0 auto;
    overflow: visible;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-logo {
    width: min(72vw, 230px) !important;
    max-width: 230px !important;
  }
