```css
  html.staff-scope .login-brand {
    padding-bottom: 0 !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card > div,
  html.staff-scope .login-dev-panel .login-card--dev > div {
    padding: 16px !important;
  }
}

/* Real portrait phones keep login cards stacked even when browser UI changes
   make CSS width and device width disagree. */
@media (max-device-width: 640px) and (orientation: portrait), (pointer: coarse) and (orientation: portrait) {
  html.staff-scope body:has(.login-page-wrapper) {
    overflow-y: auto;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-page-wrapper {
    height: auto;
    min-height: 100dvh;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    gap: 14px;
    padding: max(12px, env(safe-area-inset-top)) 12px max(18px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) !important;
    overflow-y: auto;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-center-stage {
    order: 1;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 420px;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-identity-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-dev-panel {
    order: 2;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 420px;
    height: auto;
    max-height: none;
    margin: 0 auto;
    overflow: visible;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-logo {
    width: min(72vw, 230px) !important;
    max-width: 230px !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-brand {
    padding-bottom: 0 !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card > div,
  html.staff-scope .login-dev-panel .login-card--dev > div {
    padding: 16px !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 390px) and (orientation: portrait) {
  html.staff-scope .login-logo {
    width: min(70vw, 200px) !important;
    max-width: 200px !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card > div,
  html.staff-scope .login-dev-panel .login-card--dev > div {
    padding: 14px !important;
  }
}

/* iPhone landscape (very specific) */
@media (max-width: 844px) and (max-height: 428px) and (orientation: landscape) {
  html.staff-scope .login-page-wrapper {
    padding: 20px 16px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-logo {
    max-width: 240px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-brand {
    padding-bottom: 6px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack > div > div {
    padding: 1.25rem;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-form {
    gap: 14px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-inner {
    gap: 14px;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-input,
  html.staff-scope .login-select {
    padding: 9px 12px;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack h2 {
    font-size: 1.2rem;
  }

  html.staff-scope .login-card-stack p {
    font-size: 0.82rem;
  }
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Popup Dialog Styles === */
/* ========================================================= */
html.staff-scope .popup-backdrop {
  --popup-viewport-gap: clamp(10px, 2.5vw, 20px);
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: 100vw;
  height: 100dvh;
  max-height: 100dvh;
  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.68);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  z-index: 9999;
  overflow: hidden;
  overscroll-behavior: contain;
  padding: var(--popup-viewport-gap);
}

html.staff-scope .app-section-card,
html.staff-scope .app-layout-section-shell,
html.staff-scope .app-layout-card,
html.staff-scope .app-layout-surface-subtle,
html.staff-scope .app-layout-surface-accent,
html.staff-scope [data-dev-section-type="section-shell"],
html.staff-scope [data-dev-section-type="content-card"] {
  background-image: none !important;
  backdrop-filter: none !important;
  filter: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope .popup-card {
  background-color: var(--surface);
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  position: relative;
  width: min(100%, 960px);
  max-width: calc(100vw - (var(--popup-viewport-gap) * 2));
  max-height: calc(100dvh - (var(--popup-viewport-gap) * 2));
  overflow-y: auto;
  overscroll-behavior: contain;
  margin: auto;
  min-height: 0;
}

html.staff-scope .popup-backdrop > * {
  max-width: calc(100vw - (var(--popup-viewport-gap) * 2));
  max-height: calc(100dvh - (var(--popup-viewport-gap) * 2));
  overflow-y: auto;
  overscroll-behavior: contain;
  min-height: 0;
}

@media (orientation: portrait), (max-width: 768px) {
  html.staff-scope .popup-backdrop,
  html.staff-scope [aria-modal="true"].popup-backdrop,
  html.staff-scope [data-modal-portal="true"] > .popup-backdrop {
    --popup-viewport-gap: max(8px, env(safe-area-inset-top), env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
    width: 100vw !important;
    height: 100dvh !important;
    max-height: 100dvh !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    justify-content: center !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    padding: var(--popup-viewport-gap) !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .popup-card,
  html.staff-scope .popup-backdrop > * {
    width: min(100%, calc(100vw - (var(--popup-viewport-gap) * 2))) !important;
    max-width: calc(100vw - (var(--popup-viewport-gap) * 2)) !important;
    max-height: calc(100dvh - (var(--popup-viewport-gap) * 2)) !important;
    overflow-x: hidden !important;
    overflow-y: auto !important;
    overscroll-behavior: contain !important;
    margin: auto !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  }
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-backdrop {
  align-items: center;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup {
  width: min(100%, var(--video-editor-max-width, 520px));
  max-width: min(var(--video-editor-max-width, 520px), calc(100vw - (var(--popup-viewport-gap) * 2)));
  background: var(--surface);
  color: var(--surfaceText);
  border: 1px solid var(--primary-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: 0 30px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  overflow: hidden;
  font-family: var(--font-family);
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup__header {
  padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-5);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--primary-border);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: var(--space-3);
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup__title {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--surfaceText);
  font-size: var(--text-h3);
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup__meta {
  color: var(--surfaceTextMuted);
  font-size: var(--text-caption);
  font-weight: 700;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup__body {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto auto;
  gap: var(--space-4);
  padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-5);
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: auto;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup__footer {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  align-items: center;
  gap: var(--space-sm);
  padding: var(--space-3) var(--space-5) calc(var(--space-3) + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
  border-top: 1px solid var(--primary-border);
  background: var(--control-bg);
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup__cancel {
  margin-right: auto;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup__status {
  padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-3);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: var(--control-bg);
  color: var(--surfaceText);
  font-size: var(--text-body-sm);
  font-weight: 700;
  border: none;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup__status.is-error {
  background: rgba(var(--danger-rgb), 0.12);
  color: var(--danger);
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-player {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: var(--video-editor-aspect-ratio, 0.5625);
  background: #000;
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--hud-divider);
  box-shadow: var(--hud-shadow-lg);
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-player__video {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: contain;
  background: #000;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: block;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-player__loading {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: var(--hud-text);
  padding: var(--space-lg);
  text-align: center;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-player__loading-content {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-sm);
  max-width: 380px;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-player__loading-title {
  font-size: var(--text-h3);
  font-weight: 800;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-player__loading-copy {
  color: var(--hud-text-muted);
  font-size: var(--text-body-sm);
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-player__time-strip {
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  padding: var(--space-3) var(--space-4);
  background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0));
  color: #fff;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  font-size: var(--text-body-sm);
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  font-weight: 700;
  pointer-events: none;
  transition: opacity 160ms ease;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-player__clip-range {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75);
  font-size: var(--text-caption);
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-timeline {
  background: var(--surface);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  border: 1px solid var(--primary-border);
  padding: var(--space-4);
  color: var(--surfaceText);
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-timeline__header {
  color: var(--surfaceTextMuted);
  font-size: var(--text-caption);
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking-caps);
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-timeline__time {
  color: var(--surfaceText);
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-timeline__audio-toggle {
  color: var(--surfaceText);
  font-size: var(--text-body-sm);
  font-weight: 600;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-timeline__track {
  height: 56px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: var(--control-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--primary-border);
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-timeline__legend {
  color: var(--surfaceTextMuted);
  font-size: var(--text-caption);
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-timeline__switch {
  width: 44px;
  height: var(--control-height);
  border-radius: var(--control-radius);
  border: 1px solid var(--primary-border);
}

html.staff-scope .video-editor-timeline__tool-button {
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0 var(--space-3);
  border-radius: var(--control-radius);
  font-size: var(--text-caption);
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  transition: background-color 160ms ease, opacity 160ms ease;
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup__header,
  html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup__body,
  html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup__footer {
    padding-inline: var(--space-3);
  }

  html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup__footer .app-btn {
    flex: 1 1 auto;
  }

  html.staff-scope .video-editor-popup__cancel {
    margin-right: 0;
  }
}

/* Prevent global hover lift clipping inside the Start New Chat modal's scroll containers. */
html.staff-scope .start-new-chat-popup button:hover,
html.staff-scope .start-new-chat-popup button:active {
  transform: none;
}

/* Keep hover feedback inside Start New Chat without lift/jank. */
html.staff-scope .start-new-chat-popup .chat-user-option {
  transition: background-color 0.14s ease, border-color 0.14s ease;
}

html.staff-scope .start-new-chat-popup .chat-user-option:hover,
html.staff-scope .start-new-chat-popup .chat-user-option:focus-visible {
  background-color: var(--theme) !important;
  border-color: rgba(var(--accent-base-rgb), 0.4) !important;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  html.staff-scope .popup-backdrop {
    align-items: flex-start;
  }
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Cosmetic Notes Textarea Styles === */
/* ========================================================= */
/* Light mode: white background */
html.staff-scope .cosmetic-notes-active {
  background-color: var(--surface) !important;
  color: var(--text-1) !important;
}

html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-bottom-row {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 16px;
  align-items: stretch;
}

html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-bottom-card {
  min-width: 0;
  height: 100%;
}

html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-info-header {
  row-gap: 10px;
}

html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-selector-wrap {
  min-width: 0;
}

html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-selector {
  min-width: 0;
}

/* Dark mode: dark grey background with white text */
html.staff-scope [data-theme="dark"] .cosmetic-notes-active {
  background-color: var(--surface) !important;
  color: var(--text-1) !important;
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === My Jobs Row Layout === */
/* ========================================================= */
html.staff-scope .myjobs-row {
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  row-gap: 6px;
}

html.staff-scope .myjobs-cell {
  min-width: 0;
  flex: 0 1 auto;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

html.staff-scope .myjobs-status,
html.staff-scope .myjobs-clock,
html.staff-scope .myjobs-writeup {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

html.staff-scope .myjobs-customer,
html.staff-scope .myjobs-make {
  flex: 1 1 160px;
}

html.staff-scope .myjobs-jobnumber,
html.staff-scope .myjobs-reg,
html.staff-scope .myjobs-type,
html.staff-scope .myjobs-date {
  flex: 0 1 110px;
}

@media (min-width: 920px) {
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-row {
    flex-wrap: nowrap;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-bottom-row {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-info-header {
    align-items: flex-start !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-selector-wrap {
    width: 100%;
    justify-content: flex-start !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-bottom-card-header {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 720px) {
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-header {
    display: none;
  }

  html.staff-scope .myjobs-status,
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-clock,
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-writeup,
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-jobnumber,
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-reg,
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-type,
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-date {
    flex: 0 1 calc(50% - 6px) !important;
    min-width: 0 !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .myjobs-customer,
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-make {
    flex: 1 1 100% !important;
    min-width: 0 !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-bottom-row {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-selector {
    width: 100%;
  }

  html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-selector button,
  html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-add-linked-button,
  html.staff-scope .job-cards-create-remove-linked-button {
    flex: 1 1 auto;
  }
}

/* iPhone / phone vertical view ŌĆö full-width stacked card rows */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-header {
    display: none !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .myjobs-row {
    flex-wrap: wrap !important;
    row-gap: 4px !important;
    padding: 10px 12px !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .myjobs-cell {
    min-width: 0 !important;
    white-space: normal !important;
    overflow: visible !important;
    text-overflow: unset !important;
  }

  /* Status spans full width as a header badge */
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-status {
    flex: 1 1 100% !important;
    min-width: 0 !important;
    text-align: left !important;
    max-width: fit-content !important;
  }

  /* Job number and Reg share a row ŌĆö each takes half */
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-jobnumber,
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-reg {
    flex: 1 1 calc(50% - 6px) !important;
    min-width: 0 !important;
  }

  /* Customer, Make/Model, Type each get full width */
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-customer,
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-make,
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-type,
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-date {
    flex: 1 1 100% !important;
    min-width: 0 !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope .myjobs-clock,
  html.staff-scope .myjobs-writeup {
    flex: 0 1 calc(50% - 6px) !important;
    min-width: 0 !important;
  }
}

/* ===========================
   PRINT STYLES ŌĆō Invoice Only
   =========================== */

@media print {
  @page {
    size: A4 portrait;
    margin: 12mm 10mm;
  }

  /* Hide everything by default */
  html.staff-scope body > *,
  html.staff-scope body > div > *,
  html.staff-scope #__next > *,
  html.staff-scope #__next > div > * {
    visibility: hidden !important;
    position: absolute !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    height: 0 !important;
    width: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    border: none !important;
  }

  /* Show the invoice print area and all its children */
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area],
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] * {
    visibility: visible !important;
    position: static !important;
    overflow: visible !important;
    height: auto !important;
    width: auto !important;
  }

  /* Make the invoice area the root of the print layout */
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] {
    display: block !important;
    position: fixed !important;
    top: 0 !important;
    left: 0 !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    z-index: 99999 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    background: #fff !important;
  }

  /* Hide the prerequisites warning in print */
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] > div:first-child:has(ul) {
    display: none !important;
  }

  /* Hide the print and email buttons in print output */
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] .invoice-action-buttons {
    display: none !important;
  }

  /* Ensure all ancestors are visible and unstyled for print flow */
  html.staff-scope body,
  html.staff-scope #__next,
  html.staff-scope #__next > div,
  html.staff-scope main,
  html.staff-scope section {
    visibility: visible !important;
    position: static !important;
    overflow: visible !important;
    height: auto !important;
    width: auto !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    border: none !important;
    background: #fff !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    border-radius: 0 !important;
    display: block !important;
  }

  /* Clean print-friendly styling for the invoice shell */
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] article {
    background: #fff !important;
    border: none !important;
    border-radius: 0 !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    font-size: 11pt !important;
    color: #000 !important;
  }

  /* Print-friendly table styles */
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] table {
    width: 100% !important;
    border-collapse: collapse !important;
    font-size: 10pt !important;
    page-break-inside: auto !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] table th {
    background: #f5f5f5 !important;
    color: #333 !important;
    border-bottom: 2px solid #333 !important;
    padding: 6px 8px !important;
    font-size: 9pt !important;
    -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact !important;
    print-color-adjust: exact !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] table td {
    border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd !important;
    padding: 5px 8px !important;
    color: #000 !important;
  }

  /* Make headings and text black for print */
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] h1,
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] h2,
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] h3,
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] strong,
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] p,
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] span,
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] li,
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] div {
    color: #000 !important;
  }

  /* Totals section ŌĆō print friendly */
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] [class*="totalsFooter"] {
    border-top: 2px solid #333 !important;
    padding-top: 8px !important;
  }

  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] [class*="totalCard"] {
    background: #f9f9f9 !important;
    border: 1px solid #ccc !important;
    -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact !important;
    print-color-adjust: exact !important;
  }

  /* Request blocks ŌĆō prevent break inside */
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] [class*="requestBlock"] {
    border: 1px solid #ddd !important;
    page-break-inside: avoid !important;
    break-inside: avoid !important;
    margin-bottom: 10px !important;
  }

  /* Vehicle row and header boxes */
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] [class*="headerBox"],
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] [class*="vehicleRow"] {
    border: 1px solid #ddd !important;
    background: #fafafa !important;
    -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact !important;
    print-color-adjust: exact !important;
  }

  /* Payment details */
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] [class*="paymentDetails"] {
    border: 1px solid #ddd !important;
    background: #fafafa !important;
    page-break-inside: avoid !important;
    -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact !important;
    print-color-adjust: exact !important;
  }

  /* Company header layout */
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] [class*="companyHeader"] {
    border-bottom: 2px solid #333 !important;
    padding-bottom: 12px !important;
    margin-bottom: 12px !important;
  }

  /* Links should show as plain text */
  html.staff-scope [data-invoice-print-area] a {
    color: #000 !important;
    text-decoration: none !important;
  }
}

/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Appointments calendar table ŌĆö Saturday row highlight ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
/* Applied via className="appt-sat-row" on the <tr>.                       */
/* !important overrides row-level backgroundColor and any td inline styles */
html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-sat-row,
html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-sat-row td {
  background: var(--warning-surface) !important;
  color: var(--warning-text) !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-today-row,
html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-today-row td {
  background: var(--success-surface) !important;
  color: var(--success-text) !important;
}


/* ŌöĆŌöĆ Appointments calendar table ŌĆö row hover ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ */
/* Uses inset box-shadow instead of filter ŌĆö filter creates a stacking     */
/* context on tbody rows which can paint over the sticky thead.            */
/* box-shadow never creates a stacking context, so sticky stays on top.    */
html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tbody tr:hover td {
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 9999px rgba(var(--shadow-rgb), 0.07);
  transition: box-shadow 0.15s ease;
}

/* Scroll still works; the visual scrollbar is hidden. Firefox uses          */
/* scrollbar-width: none, Webkit hides the ::-webkit-scrollbar pseudo, and   */
/* IE/legacy Edge use -ms-overflow-style: none.                              */
html.staff-scope .appointments-calendar-table-scroll {
  --appointments-scrollbar-overlay-width: 0px;
  background: transparent !important;
  scrollbar-width: none;
  -ms-overflow-style: none;
}

html.staff-scope .appointments-calendar-table-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
  display: none;
}

html.staff-scope .appointments-calendar-table-scroll #appointments-auto-data-table-2 {
  width: calc(100% + var(--appointments-scrollbar-overlay-width)) !important;
  min-width: calc(100% + var(--appointments-scrollbar-overlay-width)) !important;
  margin-right: calc(var(--appointments-scrollbar-overlay-width) * -1);
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 thead th {
  background: var(--page-shell-bg) !important;
  color: var(--text-1) !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tbody tr {
  background: var(--surface) !important;
  background-image: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tbody td {
  background: transparent !important;
  background-image: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-sat-row,
html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-sat-row td {
  background: var(--warning-surface) !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-today-row,
html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-today-row td {
  background: var(--success-surface) !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-selected-row:not(.appt-today-row):not(.appt-sat-row),
html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-selected-row:not(.appt-today-row):not(.appt-sat-row) td {
  background: rgba(var(--primary-rgb), 0.25) !important;
  color: var(--text-1) !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-sat-row.appt-selected-row,
html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-sat-row.appt-selected-row td {
  background: var(--warning-text) !important;
  color: var(--text-2) !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-today-row.appt-selected-row,
html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-today-row.appt-selected-row td {
  background: var(--success-text) !important;
  color: var(--text-2) !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-sat-row *,
html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-today-row *,
html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tr.appt-selected-row * {
  color: inherit !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tbody tr:not(.appt-sat-row):not(.appt-today-row):not(.appt-selected-row):hover td {
  background: var(--control-bg-hover) !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  transition: background-color 0.15s ease;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tbody tr.appt-sat-row:hover td {
  background: var(--warning-surface-hover) !important;
  color: var(--warning-text) !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tbody tr.appt-today-row:hover td {
  background: var(--success-surface-hover) !important;
  color: var(--text-1) !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tbody tr.appt-selected-row:not(.appt-today-row):not(.appt-sat-row):hover td {
  background: var(--theme-hover) !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tbody tr.appt-sat-row.appt-selected-row:hover td {
  background: var(--warning-surface-hover) !important;
  color: var(--warning-text) !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope #appointments-auto-data-table-2 tbody tr.appt-today-row.appt-selected-row:hover td {
  background: var(--success-surface-hover) !important;
  color: var(--text-1) !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === Notes Textarea ŌĆö compact auto-growing notes field === */
/* === Single-line height by default, grows up to 2 lines  === */
/* === Same surface treatment as a standard input          === */
/* ========================================================= */
html.staff-scope .app-notes-input {
  /* Match the global input surface so this reads as an input, not a textarea. */
  background: var(--control-bg);
  resize: none;
  /* Start at one input row; cap at exactly double so the field grows once,
     then scrolls ŌĆö keeps the form layout stable. */
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  max-height: calc(var(--control-height) * 2);
  height: var(--control-height);
  /* field-sizing makes the textarea auto-grow to its content height in modern
     browsers (Chromium 123+, Safari 17.4+). Older browsers stay at min-height. */
  field-sizing: content;
  line-height: 1.4;
  overflow: auto;
}

html.staff-scope .app-notes-input:hover {
  background: var(--control-bg-hover);
}

html.staff-scope .app-notes-input:focus,
html.staff-scope .app-notes-input:focus-visible {
  background: var(--control-bg-hover);
  box-shadow: var(--control-ring);
  outline: none;
}

/* ========================================================= */
/* === App-Wide Hidden Scrollbars                         === */
/* ========================================================= */
/* Keep every scroll container scrollable while removing the browser chrome.
   This sits at the end of the staff stylesheet so older themed scrollbar
   rules for tables, tab rails, dropdowns, pickers, modals, and textareas
   cannot reintroduce visible tracks or thumbs. */
html.staff-scope,
html.staff-scope body,
html.staff-scope * {
  scrollbar-width: none !important;
  scrollbar-color: transparent transparent !important;
  -ms-overflow-style: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope::-webkit-scrollbar,
html.staff-scope body::-webkit-scrollbar,
html.staff-scope *::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 0 !important;
  height: 0 !important;
  display: none !important;
}

html.staff-scope::-webkit-scrollbar-track,
html.staff-scope body::-webkit-scrollbar-track,
html.staff-scope *::-webkit-scrollbar-track,
html.staff-scope::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb,
html.staff-scope body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb,
html.staff-scope *::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: transparent !important;
}

```

### `src/styles/theme.css`

```css
/* file location: src/styles/theme.css */
/* Central colour and design token source for the entire application. */
/*
 * Canonical surface tokens (Layer Sweep ŌĆö see docs/layer-sweep-handoff.md):
 *   --surface  ŌĆö base "surface" layer fill. Used by <LayerSurface>.
 *   --theme    ŌĆö tinted "theme" layer fill. Used by <LayerTheme>.
 *
 * The two layer primitives <LayerSurface> and <LayerTheme>
 * (src/components/ui/LayerSurface.js and src/components/ui/LayerTheme.js)
 * are the only legal way to render a card / section surface. Consumers MUST
 * NOT use inline `background:` / `border:` / `borderRadius:` on cards or
 * sections ŌĆö see CLAUDE.md section 3.
 *
 * Deprecated aliases (do not introduce new references; will be removed in
 * Phase 3 of the layer sweep). They currently resolve to --surface so any
 * un-migrated consumer still renders correctly:
 *   --surfaceMain          ŌåÆ --surface  (legacy, never wired in this file but referenced in older docs)
 *   --section-card-bg      ŌåÆ --surface
 *   --page-card-bg         ŌåÆ --surface
 *   --row-background       ŌåÆ --surface
 *   --surface-gradient     ŌåÆ --surface
 *   --section-gradient-center ŌåÆ --surface
 *   --grey-accent-light    ŌåÆ --surface
 *   --search-surface       ŌåÆ --surface (light theme; dark theme overrides)
 *   --section-card-border  ŌåÆ none (legacy "border token" ŌĆö empty by design)
 *   --page-card-border     ŌåÆ none
 */

:root {
  color-scheme: light;
  --surface: #ffffff;
  --surfaceMain: var(--surface); /* deprecated alias ŌĆö see header comment */
  --surfaceHover: #f7f7f7;
  --surfaceMutedToken: #f3f3f3;
  --surfaceText: #0f0f0f;
  --surfaceTextMuted: #1f1f1f;
  --primary: #b91c1c;
  --primary-hover: #981717;
  --primary-pressed: #7e1313;
  --primary-selected: var(--primary-pressed);
  --accentMainRgb: 185, 28, 28;
  --accentText: var(--primary);
  --text-accent: var(--accentText);
  --onAccentText: #ffffff;
  --secondary: rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.08);
  --secondary-hover: rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.14);
  --secondary-pressed: rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.2);
  --theme: rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.1);
  /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö borders are now banned everywhere except table row separators
     (use --separating-line), inputs (--input-ring), checkboxes (--checkbox-ring),
     ghost buttons (--ghostbutton-ring) and focus rings (--focus-ring). All other
     legacy *-border tokens resolve to transparent so any straggler usage renders
     no visible outline. */
  --primary-border: transparent;
  --surface-rgb: 255, 255, 255;
  --surface-gradient: var(--surface);
  --skeleton-base: #ececef;
  --skeleton-highlight: #f6f6f8;
  --skeleton-border: transparent;
  --skeleton-radius: 8px;
  --skeleton-animation-duration: 1.8s;
  /* Row-separator line for tables / lists ŌĆö the ONLY legitimate "border-like"
     token outside inputs/checkboxes/ghost buttons/focus rings. */
  --separating-line: 1px solid rgba(var(--accent-base-rgb), 0.14);
  --table-border: var(--separating-line); /* legacy alias ŌĆö prefer --separating-line */
  /* Outline tokens (formerly *-border) for the four legitimate ring use-cases. */
  --input-ring: 1px solid var(--secondary-hover);
  --checkbox-ring: 2px solid var(--accent-strong);
  --ghostbutton-ring: 1px solid var(--primary);
  --focus-ring: 0 0 0 3px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.12);
  /* Canonical row + in-row action button heights. Demonstrated by the
     "Table States" section in /dev/user-diagnostic. Editing these tokens
     updates every table in the repo that uses .app-data-table. */
  --table-row-height: 44px;
  --table-action-btn-height: 32px;
  --text-1: var(--surfaceText);
  --text-1-rgb: 15, 15, 15;
  --text-2: var(--onAccentText);
  --text-2-rgb: 255, 255, 255;
  --legacy-marker-purple: var(--primary);
  --legacy-marker-purple-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --legacy-marker-red: var(--primary);
  --legacy-marker-red-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --accent-base: var(--secondary);
  --accent-base-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --accent-base-hover: var(--secondary-hover);
  --theme-hover: rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.16);
  --accent-strong: var(--primary);
  --primary-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --grey-accent: var(--text-1);
  --grey-accent-rgb: var(--text-1-rgb);
  --grey-accent-light: var(--surface);
  --grey-accent-light-rgb: var(--surface-rgb);
  --grey-accent-dark: var(--text-1);
  --successMain: #22c55e;
  --success-base: #22c55e;
  --success-base-hover: #16a34a;
  --success-strong: #15803d;
  --success-surface: #dcfce7;
  --success-surface-hover: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.22);
  --success-rgb: 34, 197, 94;
  --success: var(--success-base);
  --success-dark: var(--success-strong);
  --success-text: var(--success-strong);
  --success-hover: var(--success-base-hover);
  --authorisedMain: #10b981;
  --authorised-base: #10b981;
  --authorised-base-hover: #059669;
  --authorised-strong: #047857;
  --authorised-surface: #d1fae5;
  --authorised-surface-hover: rgba(var(--authorised-rgb), 0.22);
  --authorised-rgb: 16, 185, 129;
  --authorised: var(--authorised-base);
  --authorised-dark: var(--authorised-strong);
  --authorised-text: var(--authorised-strong);
  --authorised-hover: var(--authorised-base-hover);
  --completeMain: #0d9488;
  --complete-base: #0d9488;
  --complete-base-hover: #0f766e;
  --complete-strong: #115e59;
  --complete-surface: #ccfbf1;
  --complete-surface-hover: rgba(var(--complete-rgb), 0.22);
  --complete-rgb: 13, 148, 136;
  --complete: var(--complete-base);
  --complete-dark: var(--complete-strong);
  --complete-text: var(--complete-strong);
  --complete-hover: var(--complete-base-hover);
  --warningMain: #f59e0b;
  --warning-base: #f59e0b;
  --warning-base-hover: #d97706;
  --warning-strong: #b45309;
  --warning-surface: #fef3c7;
  --warning-surface-hover: rgba(var(--warning-rgb), 0.24);
  --warning-rgb: 245, 158, 11;
  --warning: var(--warning-base);
  --warning-dark: var(--warning-strong);
  --warning-text: #92400e;
  --warning-hover: var(--warning-base-hover);
  --dangerMain: #ef4444;
  --danger-base: #ef4444;
  --danger-base-hover: #dc2626;
  --danger-strong: #b91c1c;
  --danger-surface: #fee2e2;
  --danger-surface-hover: rgba(var(--danger-rgb), 0.24);
  --declined-section-bg: #fcd5d5;
  --danger-rgb: 239, 68, 68;
  --danger: var(--danger-base);
  --danger-dark: var(--danger-strong);
  --danger-text: var(--danger-strong);
  --danger-hover: var(--danger-base-hover);
  --error: var(--danger);
  --error-dark: var(--danger-dark);
  --error-surface: var(--danger-surface);
  --error-rgb: var(--danger-rgb);
  --error-text: var(--danger-text);
  --error-hover: var(--danger-hover);
  --error-surface-hover: var(--danger-surface-hover);
  --info: #d96f6f;
  --info-dark: #bf5656;
  --info-rgb: 217, 111, 111;
  --theme-status: rgba(var(--info-rgb), 0.18);
  --accent-purple: var(--primary);
  --accent-purple-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --accent-layer-1: #ff00ff;
  --accent-layer-2: #ff00ff;
  --accent-layer-3: #ff00ff;
  --accent-layer-4: #ff00ff;
  --accent-layer-1-rgb: 255, 0, 255;
  --accent-layer-2-rgb: 255, 0, 255;
  --accent-layer-3-rgb: 255, 0, 255;
  --accent-layer-4-rgb: 255, 0, 255;
  --profile-table-surface: var(--accent-base);
  --profile-table-alt-surface: var(--accent-base-hover);
  --accent-orange: var(--primary);
  --accent-orange-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --accent-blue: var(--primary);
  --accent-blue-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --calendar-selection-border: none;
  --calendar-saturday-row-bg: var(--warning-surface);
  --calendar-amber-selected-bg: var(--warning-text);
  --calendar-red-selected-bg: var(--danger-text);
  --calendar-today-row-bg: var(--theme);
  --calendar-today-row-border: transparent; /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö borders banned outside lists/inputs/checkboxes/ghost buttons/focus rings */
  --calendar-today-pill-bg: var(--theme-hover);
  --calendar-today-pill-text: var(--text-1);
  --search-surface: var(--surface);
  --search-surface-muted: var(--surface);
  --search-text: var(--primary-pressed);
  --overlay: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.4);
  --overlay-muted: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.24);
  --layer-section-level-3: var(--theme);
  --layer-section-level-4: var(--primary);
  --row-background: var(--surface);
  --text-color: var(--text-1);
  --section-gradient-outer: var(--secondary-hover);
  --section-gradient-inner: var(--secondary);
  --section-gradient-center: var(--surface);
  --layer-gradient: var(--secondary);
  --radius-xs: 8px;
  --radius-sm: 12px;
  --radius-md: 16px;
  --radius-lg: 20px;
  --radius-xl: 24px;
  --radius-pill: 999px;
  --radius-full: 50%;
  --radius-card: var(--radius-xl);
  --radius-panel: var(--radius-lg);
  --radius-control: var(--radius-sm);
  --section-card-radius: var(--radius-md);
  --section-card-padding: 20px;
  --section-card-padding-sm: 16px;
  --section-card-bg: var(--surface);
  --section-card-border: none;
  --input-radius: var(--control-radius);
  --input-padding: var(--control-padding);
  --input-bg: var(--control-bg);
  --input-border: var(--input-ring); /* legacy alias ŌĆö prefer --input-ring (inputs are an allowed ring use-case) */
  --page-max-width: 1680px;
  --page-content-max-width: 100%;
  --page-gutter-x: 20px;
  --page-gutter-y: 18px;
  --page-gutter-x-mobile: 12px;
  --page-gutter-y-mobile: 14px;
  --page-stack-gap: 20px;
  --page-stack-gap-mobile: 16px;
  --page-card-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  --page-card-padding: 24px;
  --page-card-padding-mobile: 16px;
  --page-card-border: none;
  --page-card-bg: var(--surface);
  --page-accent-layer: var(--secondary);
  --page-shell-bg: var(--secondary);
  --nav-shell-bg: var(--secondary);
  --nav-shell-border: none;
  --tab-container-bg: var(--secondary);
  --tab-item-bg: #f3f3f3;
  --tab-item-bg-hover: #e5e7eb;
  --tab-item-text: #0f0f0f;
  --nav-link-bg: var(--secondary);
  --nav-link-bg-hover: var(--secondary-hover);
  --nav-link-bg-active: var(--primary);
  --nav-link-border: none; /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö borders banned outside lists/inputs/checkboxes/ghost buttons/focus rings */
  --nav-link-border-active: none; /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö borders banned outside lists/inputs/checkboxes/ghost buttons/focus rings */
  --control-height: 44px;
  --control-height-sm: 40px;
  --control-height-xs: 34px;
  --dropdown-trigger-height: var(--control-height);
  --dropdown-trigger-height-sm: var(--control-height);
  --control-radius: 14px;
  --control-radius-sm: var(--radius-sm);
  --control-radius-xs: 10px;
  --dropdown-trigger-radius: var(--control-radius);
  --dropdown-trigger-radius-sm: var(--control-radius-sm);
  --control-menu-radius: var(--radius-md);
  --control-padding: 10px 14px;
  --control-padding-sm: 8px 12px;
  --control-padding-xs: 5px 9px;
  --dropdown-trigger-padding: var(--control-padding);
  --dropdown-trigger-padding-sm: var(--control-padding-sm);
  --control-font-size: 0.92rem;
  --control-font-weight: 500;
  --control-label-size: 0.82rem;
  --control-label-weight: 600;
  --control-gap: 10px;
  --secondary-border: transparent; /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö see --primary-border note above */
  --control-border: none; /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö inputs use --input-ring directly */
  --control-border-hover: var(--secondary-hover); /* colour-only alias for hover ring */
  --control-border-focus: var(--secondary-hover); /* colour-only alias for focus ring */
  --control-bg: var(--secondary);
  --control-bg-hover: var(--secondary-hover);
  --control-bg-active: var(--secondary-hover);
  --textfieldbackground: #9ca3af;
  --control-muted-text: var(--text-1);
  --control-icon: var(--text-1);
  --control-menu-bg: var(--surface);
  --control-menu-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.18), 0 0 32px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.22), 0 0 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10);
  --control-ring: 0 0 0 3px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.12);
  --dropdown-trigger-bg: var(--secondary);
  --dropdown-trigger-color: var(--text-1);
  --dropdown-trigger-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --dropdown-menu-bg: var(--surface);
  --dropdown-menu-shadow:
    0 0 36px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18),
    0 0 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10);
  --dropdown-option-bg: var(--secondary);
  --dropdown-option-color: var(--text-1);
  --dropdown-option-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --dropdown-option-selected-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --dropdown-option-selected-color: var(--accentText);
  --calendar-day-bg: var(--secondary);
  --calendar-day-color: var(--text-1);
  --calendar-day-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --calendar-day-selected-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --calendar-day-selected-color: var(--accentText);
  --timepicker-option-bg: var(--secondary);
  --timepicker-option-color: var(--text-1);
  --timepicker-option-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --timepicker-option-selected-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --timepicker-option-selected-color: var(--accentText);
  --timepicker-now-bg: var(--secondary);
  --timepicker-now-color: var(--text-1);
  --timepicker-now-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --searchbar-clear-bg: var(--secondary);
  --searchbar-clear-color: var(--text-1);
  --searchbar-clear-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --tab-button-bg: var(--theme);
  --tab-button-color: var(--text-1);
  --tab-button-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --tab-button-selected-bg: var(--primary-selected);
  --tab-button-selected-color: var(--onAccentText);
  --control-transition:
    background-color 0.18s ease,
    border-color 0.18s ease,
    color 0.18s ease,
    box-shadow 0.18s ease;
  --layout-card-padding: 24px;
  --layout-card-gap: 10px;
  --layout-stack-gap: 20px;

  /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Spacing scale ŌöĆŌöĆ */
  --space-xs: 4px;
  --space-1: 6px;
  --space-sm: 8px;
  --space-2: 10px;
  --space-3: 12px;
  --space-4: 14px;
  --space-md: 16px;
  --space-5: 18px;
  --space-6: 20px;
  --space-lg: 24px;
  --space-7: 28px;
  --space-xl: 32px;
  --space-2xl: 48px;

  /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Page width tokens ŌöĆŌöĆ */
  --page-width-form: 900px;
  --page-width-content: 1200px;

  /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Typography scale ŌöĆŌöĆ */
  /* App-wide font. Single source of truth ŌĆö change here to update everywhere.
     `--font-inter` is loaded via next/font in src/pages/_app.js (self-hosted,
     SF-style). Apple system fonts and platform fallbacks follow in case the
     webfont fails or hasn't yet swapped. To switch fonts app-wide, replace
     this token's value (or swap the next/font import in _app.js). */
  --font-family: var(--font-inter), "SF Pro Text", "SF Pro Display",
    -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu,
    Cantarell, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
  /* Monospace token for code blocks, JSON output, raw IDs, dev overlays.
     Use `var(--font-family-mono)` instead of hardcoding a monospace stack. */
  --font-family-mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas,
    "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace;
  --text-h1: 1.75rem;
  --text-h2: 1.35rem;
  --text-h3: 1.1rem;
  --text-h4: 1rem;
  --text-body: 0.95rem;
  --text-body-sm: 0.88rem;
  --text-label: 0.82rem;
  --text-caption: 0.75rem;
  --text-control: var(--control-font-size);
  --leading-tight: 1.2;
  --leading-normal: 1.35;
  --leading-relaxed: 1.5;
  --tracking-tight: -0.01em;
  --tracking-normal: 0;
  --tracking-wide: 0.04em;
  --tracking-caps: 0.06em;

  /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Z-index scale ŌöĆŌöĆ */
  --z-base: 0;
  --z-dropdown: 100;
  --z-sticky: 200;
  --z-overlay: 500;
  --z-modal: 1000;
  --z-popover: 1500;
  --z-toast: 2000;

  /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Shadow / elevation scale ŌöĆŌöĆ */
  --shadow-sm: none;
  --shadow-md: none;
  --shadow-lg: none;
  --shadow-xl: none;

  /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Transition durations ŌöĆŌöĆ */
  --duration-fast: 0.12s;
  --duration-normal: 0.18s;
  --duration-slow: 0.3s;
  --ease-default: ease;
  --ease-out: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);

  /* Scrollbar colors */
  --scrollbar-thumb: var(--accent-strong);
  --scrollbar-thumb-hover: var(--primary-hover);

  /* ŌöĆŌöĆ Camera HUD tokens ŌöĆŌöĆ
     Chrome that floats over the live video feed. Values are
     intentionally dark in both themes because they have to remain
     legible over any video frame. Keep every camera-overlay style
     referencing these tokens ŌĆö never hardcode the underlying rgba. */
  --hud-scrim: #05070b;
  --hud-surface: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.60);
  --hud-surface-strong: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.82);
  --hud-surface-subtle: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.38);
  --hud-surface-glass: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.94);
  --hud-border: transparent; /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö borders banned outside lists/inputs/checkboxes/ghost buttons/focus rings */
  --hud-border-strong: transparent; /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö borders banned outside lists/inputs/checkboxes/ghost buttons/focus rings */
  --hud-divider: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  --hud-rail: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
  --hud-text: #f8fafc;
  --hud-text-rgb: 248, 250, 252;
  --hud-text-muted: rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.82);
  --hud-text-dim: rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.55);
  --hud-shadow-md: 0 14px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38);
  --hud-shadow-lg: 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45);
  --hud-blur: blur(12px);
  --hud-blur-strong: blur(18px) saturate(140%);
  --hud-gradient-top-bottom: linear-gradient(
    to bottom,
    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45) 0%,
    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 18%,
    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 78%,
    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7) 100%
  );
}

:root[data-theme="dark"] {
  color-scheme: dark;
  --surface: #16161a;
  --surfaceMain: var(--surface); /* deprecated alias ŌĆö see header comment */
  --surfaceHover: #23232b;
  --surfaceMutedToken: #1d1d24;
  --surfaceText: #f8f7ff;
  --surfaceTextMuted: #f2f2ff;
  --primary: #f87171;
  --primary-hover: #fa9393;
  --primary-pressed: #fcb1b1;
  --primary-selected: var(--primary-pressed);
  --secondary: rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.16);
  --secondary-hover: rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.24);
  --secondary-pressed: rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.32);
  --theme: rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.18);
  --surface-rgb: 22, 22, 26;
  --surface-gradient: var(--surface);
  --skeleton-base: #23232c;
  --skeleton-highlight: #2f2f3a;
  --skeleton-border: transparent;
  --skeleton-radius: 8px;
  --skeleton-animation-duration: 1.8s;
  --primary-border: transparent; /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö see light-theme note */
  --separating-line: 1px solid rgba(var(--accent-base-rgb), 0.2);
  --table-border: var(--separating-line); /* legacy alias ŌĆö prefer --separating-line */
  --input-ring: 1px solid var(--secondary-hover);
  --checkbox-ring: 2px solid var(--accent-strong);
  --ghostbutton-ring: 1px solid var(--primary);
  --focus-ring: 0 0 0 3px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.18);
  --text-1: var(--surfaceText);
  --text-1-rgb: 248, 247, 255;
  --text-2: #0a0a0c;
  --text-2-rgb: 10, 10, 12;
  --text-accent: var(--accentText);
  --legacy-marker-purple: var(--primary);
  --legacy-marker-purple-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --legacy-marker-red: var(--primary);
  --legacy-marker-red-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --accent-base: var(--secondary);
  --accent-base-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --theme-hover: rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.26);
  --accent-strong: var(--primary);
  --primary-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --grey-accent: var(--text-1);
  --grey-accent-rgb: var(--text-1-rgb);
  --grey-accent-light: var(--surface);
  --grey-accent-light-rgb: var(--surface-rgb);
  --grey-accent-dark: var(--text-1);
  --successMain: #4ade80;
  --success-base: #4ade80;
  --success-base-hover: #86efac;
  --success-strong: #22c55e;
  --success-surface: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.18);
  --success-surface-hover: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.3);
  --success-rgb: 74, 222, 128;
  --success: var(--success-base);
  --success-dark: var(--success-strong);
  --success-text: #bbf7d0;
  --success-hover: var(--success-base-hover);
  --authorisedMain: #34d399;
  --authorised-base: #34d399;
  --authorised-base-hover: #6ee7b7;
  --authorised-strong: #10b981;
  --authorised-surface: rgba(var(--authorised-rgb), 0.18);
  --authorised-surface-hover: rgba(var(--authorised-rgb), 0.3);
  --authorised-rgb: 52, 211, 153;
  --authorised: var(--authorised-base);
  --authorised-dark: var(--authorised-strong);
  --authorised-text: #a7f3d0;
  --authorised-hover: var(--authorised-base-hover);
  --completeMain: #2dd4bf;
  --complete-base: #2dd4bf;
  --complete-base-hover: #5eead4;
  --complete-strong: #14b8a6;
  --complete-surface: rgba(var(--complete-rgb), 0.18);
  --complete-surface-hover: rgba(var(--complete-rgb), 0.3);
  --complete-rgb: 45, 212, 191;
  --complete: var(--complete-base);
  --complete-dark: var(--complete-strong);
  --complete-text: #99f6e4;
  --complete-hover: var(--complete-base-hover);
  --warningMain: #fbbf24;
  --warning-base: #fbbf24;
  --warning-base-hover: #fcd34d;
  --warning-strong: #f59e0b;
  --warning-surface: rgba(var(--warning-rgb), 0.24);
  --warning-surface-hover: rgba(var(--warning-rgb), 0.34);
  --warning-rgb: 251, 191, 36;
  --warning: var(--warning-base);
  --warning-dark: var(--warning-strong);
  --warning-text: #ffd08a;
  --warning-hover: var(--warning-base-hover);
  --dangerMain: #f87171;
  --danger-base: #f87171;
  --danger-base-hover: #fca5a5;
  --danger-strong: #ef4444;
  --danger-surface: rgba(var(--danger-rgb), 0.24);
  --danger-surface-hover: rgba(var(--danger-rgb), 0.34);
  --declined-section-bg: rgba(var(--danger-rgb), 0.34);
  --danger-rgb: 248, 113, 113;
  --danger: var(--danger-base);
  --danger-dark: var(--danger-strong);
  --danger-text: #fecaca;
  --danger-hover: var(--danger-base-hover);
  --error: var(--danger);
  --error-dark: var(--danger-dark);
  --error-surface: var(--danger-surface);
  --error-rgb: var(--danger-rgb);
  --error-text: var(--danger-text);
  --error-hover: var(--danger-hover);
  --error-surface-hover: var(--danger-surface-hover);
  --info: #f2a3a3;
  --info-dark: #f7bcbc;
  --info-rgb: 242, 163, 163;
  --theme-status: rgba(var(--info-rgb), 0.26);
  --accent-purple: var(--primary);
  --accent-purple-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --accent-layer-1: #ff00ff;
  --accent-layer-2: #ff00ff;
  --accent-layer-3: #ff00ff;
  --accent-layer-4: #ff00ff;
  --accent-layer-1-rgb: 255, 0, 255;
  --accent-layer-2-rgb: 255, 0, 255;
  --accent-layer-3-rgb: 255, 0, 255;
  --accent-layer-4-rgb: 255, 0, 255;
  --profile-table-surface: var(--accent-base);
  --profile-table-alt-surface: var(--accent-base-hover);
  --accent-orange: var(--primary);
  --accent-orange-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --accent-blue: var(--primary);
  --accent-blue-rgb: var(--accentMainRgb);
  --calendar-selection-border: none;
  --calendar-saturday-row-bg: var(--warning-surface);
  --calendar-amber-selected-bg: var(--warning-text);
  --calendar-red-selected-bg: var(--danger-text);
  --calendar-today-row-bg: var(--theme);
  --calendar-today-row-border: transparent; /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö see light-theme note */
  --calendar-today-pill-bg: var(--theme-hover);
  --calendar-today-pill-text: var(--text-1);
  --search-surface: #2a2a32;
  --search-surface-muted: var(--surface);
  --search-text: var(--primary-pressed);
  --overlay: rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.72);
  --overlay-muted: rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.5);
  --layer-section-level-3: var(--theme);
  --layer-section-level-4: var(--primary);
  --row-background: var(--surface);
  --text-color: var(--text-1);
  --section-gradient-outer: var(--secondary-hover);
  --section-gradient-inner: var(--secondary);
  --section-gradient-center: var(--surface);
  --layer-gradient: var(--secondary);
  --scrollbar-thumb: var(--accent-strong);
  --scrollbar-thumb-hover: var(--primary-hover);
  --secondary-border: transparent; /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö see light-theme note */
  --control-border: none; /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö inputs use --input-ring directly */
  --control-border-hover: var(--secondary-hover);
  --control-border-focus: var(--secondary-hover);
  --control-bg: var(--secondary);
  --control-bg-hover: var(--secondary-hover);
  --control-bg-active: var(--secondary-hover);
  --textfieldbackground: #a1a1aa;
  --control-muted-text: var(--text-1);
  --control-icon: var(--text-1);
  --control-menu-bg: var(--surface);
  --control-menu-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.18), 0 0 32px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.22), 0 0 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10);
  --control-ring: 0 0 0 3px rgba(var(--accentMainRgb), 0.18);
  --dropdown-trigger-bg: var(--secondary);
  --dropdown-trigger-color: var(--text-1);
  --dropdown-trigger-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --dropdown-menu-bg: var(--surface);
  --dropdown-menu-shadow:
    0 0 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65),
    0 0 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45),
    0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) inset;
  --dropdown-option-bg: var(--secondary);
  --dropdown-option-color: var(--text-1);
  --dropdown-option-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --dropdown-option-selected-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --dropdown-option-selected-color: var(--accentText);
  --calendar-day-bg: var(--secondary);
  --calendar-day-color: var(--text-1);
  --calendar-day-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --calendar-day-selected-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --calendar-day-selected-color: var(--accentText);
  --timepicker-option-bg: var(--secondary);
  --timepicker-option-color: var(--text-1);
  --timepicker-option-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --timepicker-option-selected-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --timepicker-option-selected-color: var(--accentText);
  --timepicker-now-bg: var(--secondary);
  --timepicker-now-color: var(--text-1);
  --timepicker-now-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --searchbar-clear-bg: var(--secondary);
  --searchbar-clear-color: var(--text-1);
  --searchbar-clear-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --tab-button-bg: var(--theme);
  --tab-button-color: var(--text-1);
  --tab-button-hover-bg: var(--secondary-hover);
  --tab-button-selected-bg: var(--primary-selected);
  --tab-button-selected-color: var(--onAccentText);
  --page-card-border: none;
  --page-card-bg: var(--surface);
  --page-accent-layer: var(--secondary);
  --nav-shell-bg: var(--secondary);
  --nav-shell-border: none;
  --tab-container-bg: var(--secondary);
  --tab-item-bg: #f3f3f3;
  --tab-item-bg-hover: #e5e7eb;
  --tab-item-text: #0f0f0f;
  --nav-link-bg: var(--secondary);
  --nav-link-bg-hover: var(--secondary-hover);
  --nav-link-bg-active: var(--primary);
  --nav-link-border: none; /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö see light-theme note */
  --nav-link-border-active: none; /* DEPRECATED ŌĆö see light-theme note */
  --shadow-sm: none;
  --shadow-md: none;
  --shadow-lg: none;
  --shadow-xl: none;
}

```
